programme.desc: A routine highway check leads to the discovery of a teenage boy in the trunk of a car.

programme.title: Poison Pill
programme.desc: After a messy drug arrest, Andy and Marlo are quarantined together.

programme.title: Skeletons
programme.desc: There's a possible connection between a missing woman and one of the division’s most distressing cases.

programme.title: Friday the 13th
programme.desc: When human bones found in a ravine open up a 15-year-old case, Swarek reunites with his old training officer.

programme.title: For Better, for Worse
programme.desc: Things get complicated when the team gets called to a hijacked casino bus full of senior citizens.

programme.title: What I Lost
programme.desc: When Chris returns for a visit, his reunion takes a shocking turn when his son, Christian, is abducted.

programme.title: You Are Here
programme.desc: Near the end of a shift, 15 Division busts a marijuana grow-op.

programme.title: Deception
programme.desc: When a pedophile is found beaten, Andy discovers Marlo has been conducting an off-hours “investigation."

programme.title: Under Fire
programme.desc: Someone with a grudge against 15 Division opens fire on Andy and Chloe.

programme.title: You Can See the Stars
programme.desc: The officers have to piece together the truth about a past crime in order to find Oliver Shaw.

programme.title: Blink
programme.desc: Andy and Dov pull themselves together at an all-night diner, but are caught off-guard in a diner hold-up.

programme.title: All By Her Selfie
programme.desc: Oliver gets promoted to Acting Staff Sergeant, and Andy is tasked with training 15 Division’s newest rookie.

programme.title: Heart Breakers, Money Makers
programme.desc: Inspector Jarvis sends the officers to seize all “proceeds of crime” – anything purchased with illegal money.

programme.title: Wanting
programme.desc: After the discovery of an executed gang leader, 15 Division must find the killer before a gang war breaks out.

programme.title: Going Under
programme.desc: When 15 Division goes undercover at a club-land bar, Chris’s erratic behavior make Dov suspicious.

programme.title: Two Truths and a Lie
programme.desc: As the officers try to hunt down the killer of Brian Gowdy – Andy and Sam go on the road for interviews.

programme.title: Deal with the Devil
programme.desc: Oliver prepares Andy to defend herself at Duncan’s dismissal hearing, now happening two hours from now.

programme.title: Exit Strategy
programme.desc: An innocuous call to a middle-class home puts Dov and Chris in the middle of a home invasion investigation.

programme.title: Moving Day
programme.desc: 15 Division works on a program to help tenants move out of a subsidized-housing complex that’s being torn down

programme.title: Fragments
programme.desc: Andy’s former rookie, Duncan, is back on duty and looking to reconcile – something she’s not ready for yet.

programme.title: Everlasting
programme.desc: The officers work to find a bomber. But after catching him, they realize he has more targets set to explode.

programme.title: Forensic Investigators S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Four bodies – two adults and two children – were found shot in a house in an outer suburb of Canberra. Inside the house was evidence that would not only lead investigators to the killer, but would uncover a secret buried for three years.

programme.title: Real Prison Breaks S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: The biggest death-row break out in U.S history and the world's first helicopter escape.

programme.title: Declassified S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: The FBI works alongside the NRO to stop a potential spy from selling classified secrets to an enemy nation.

programme.title: Forensic Investigators S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: When a young girl’s body is found in a park in the teeming rain, the police had the odds stacked against them.

programme.title: Forensic Investigators S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: In 1998, Wollongong, NSW, was gripped with fear following the brutal deaths of shopkeeper David O'Hearn and Lord Mayor Frank Arkell. Was it the work of a serial killer? Would they strike again?

programme.title: Real Prison Breaks S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Escape by a rope made of dental floss and the last man hanged in Australia: the break out that sealed his fate.

programme.title: Forensic Investigators S2 Ep. 16
programme.desc: La police enquête lorsqu'un homme disparu depuis trois mois est retrouvé décapité et enfermé dans une poubelle.

programme.title: Forensic Investigators S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: When a young police officer pulled over a car for a simple traffic infringement, he never imagined it would turn into a high speed chase.

programme.title: Murdertown S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: In Portsmouth, we examine two murders, both committed on the 12th December of different years by Allan Grimson, and the possible links to the disappearance of Simon Parkes.

programme.title: Declassified S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: After the hijacking of Egypt Air Flight 648, FBI agents launch an international manhunt.

programme.title: Forensic Investigators S2 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Forensic Investigators hosted by Lisa McCune, revisits the way in which infamous murders were performed and solved by police.

programme.title: Real Prison Breaks S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: In Britain, IRA terrorists are re-captured after just minutes on the run and in Australia, an inmate loses half his body weight and slips through his cell bar window to freedom.

programme.title: Murder Made Me Famous S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: One of the most notorious criminals, serial killer Ted Bundy used his good looks to charm his victims. He was executed in 1989 after being convicted of murdering two college women and a young girl.

programme.title: Murder Made Me Famous S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: In a candid and exclusive prison interview, the convicted murderer recounts the details of her love affair with a teenage boy that led to the brutal murder of her husband.

programme.title: Declassified S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Investigations begin on an undercover sting operation to stop illegal arms.

programme.title: Murder Made Me Famous S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: The 1980 murder of Scarsdale diet doctor, Herman Tarnower, shocks the nation. His lover and headmistress of a prestigious girls' school is arrested and convicted in a sensational trial.

programme.title: Forensic Investigators S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: After committing two violent murders in Wollongong, NSW, Mark Valera became the youngest offender to be given a life sentence. When he's behind bars his father is brutally killed. But who committed that crime and what was the motive?

programme.title: Declassified S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: A Taliban double agent was instrumental in securing the release of foreign nationals held hostage in Afghanistan.

programme.title: Forensic Investigators S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: The Melbourne suburb of South Yarra was rocked by a blast in the early hours of November 23, 1986. A car containing a bomb had exploded in the car park below the Turkish Consulate, wrecking the building and damaging shops in the area.

programme.title: Forensic Investigators S3 Ep. 5
programme.desc: When Paul Snabel didn’t return home for over a week in November 1989, his flatmate became concerned and reported him missing.

programme.title: Declassified S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Russian sleeper agents infiltrate the U.S. and begin living normal American lives.

programme.title: Declassified S3 Ep. 7
programme.desc: After a mass genocide is committed during the Bosnian War, the U.S. and NATO go after one of the most notorious war criminals.

programme.title: Declassified S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: With the help of an undercover source, the DEA's Special Operation Division launches an international manhunt.

programme.title: Declassified S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: The FBI discovers a Hezbollah terrorist cell nestled in the suburbs of Charlotte, North Carolina.

programme.title: Murdertown S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: This is the shocking story of Julie Paterson’s tragic murder and the gruesome details of the attack which shocked the local community and drove her partner to drastic measures.

programme.title: Forensic Investigators S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: When armed robbers launched a surprise attack on security guards in the process of restocking two ATMs in January 2002, they did so in broad daylight along a busy shopping strip just minutes from the heart of Melbourne.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 709
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, model and actress Charlotte Mckinney joins Rob, Sterling and Chanel to tell some "Dirty Secrets", taste some "All Natural Beef" and clench for the category "Spike My Butt".

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 705
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Nitro Circus stuntman, Andy Bell joins Rob, Sterling and Chanel to take a look at some "Nitro Sideshows," take a look at the phenomenon of "Street Prancing,"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 830
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling discuss the drunk ingenuity of "Drinkovators", explore the bizarre "Planet Of The Vapes" and test their palates for destruction in the "Taste Of Death".

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 803
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob welcomes NFL superstar Rob Gronkowski to learn what it's like to be "Unwakeable," the dangers of being "Bus Blind" and experience the strange aggression of "Mild Boys."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 814
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Sterling, and Chanel go "Flame Dumb," test out their hand skills in "Snatch Masters," and slow-mo man's best friend in "Goooooooddddd Boooooooyyyyy."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 722
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling are joined by rapper and reality TV star Ja Rule to "Keep It On The Green," run in terror from "Ja Ghouls" and be driven crazy by "These Damn Kids!"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 823
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Sterling, and Chanel hang out with artist/producer Dillon Francis to talk some "Wack Smack," learn how to party correctly in "They Did It Right"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 20
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel, and Steelo get jammed up in STUCK MY LIFE, take their chances in GATOR GAMBLIN' and enlist in the GRAVY SEALS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 5
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel, and Steelo attend a RUSSIAN TALENT SHOW, check out some nasty KID MARKS, and discover that THE WORLD'S YOUR WEAPON.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 22
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, rapper Waka Flocka Flame joins Rob, Chanel and Sterling to consider hiring some QUALIFIED ROLLERS, marvel at people who use NO HANDS, and laugh at CRAPTICAL JOKERS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 714
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Travis Scott is here to show Rob, Chanel and Sterling what it's like "Getting Action Figured," fend off the "Antidote Side Effects," and celebrate with some "Masters Of The Dark."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 6
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Jackass legend Danger Ehren teaches Rob, Steelo and Chanel the pain of GETTING DONKEY'D, how to avoid DENTAL DANGER and get adorable with some WHISKEY PETS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 25
programme.desc: On an all-new special episode of Ridiculousness dedicated to the world of weed, Rob, Steelo and Chanel check out some ANIMALS IN PANTS, explore what it's like to have BONG BRAIN and ask themselves the question AM I HIGH?

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 27
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling are joined by none other than Rob's dad, Gene Dyrdek who teaches the gang about THE POWER OF MAGNETS, that it's NEVER TOO LATE and the mysterious GREY GUNNERS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 710
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Stee-Lo, and Chanel meet with motorcycle madman Robbie Maddison showcase some "Mini Madd Asses", cause some serious "Grammage"

programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, the hosts of The Fighter and The Kid podcast, Bryan Callen and Brendan Schaub, join Rob, Chanel, and Sterling to talk about other "Fighters and Funny People,"

programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Mark Cuban joins Rob, Chanel and Steelo to discuss future investments in the MARK TANK, try to solve the CUBAN BATHROOM CRISIS and explore the DANGERS OF DUNKING.

programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Chris "Drama" Pfaff sits down with Rob, Chanel and Sterling to get "Fully Reckless," go on some "Sketchy Flights" and get saved in time by "Life Savers."

programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, rapper Big Baby D.R.A.M. joins Rob, Chanel, and Steelo to get into some BAD BROCCOLI, learn how to speak UNCLISH and fend off a few URBAN PREDATORS.

programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo learn a new game called TRAFFIC TAG, receive some DICK TIPS and things get messy when they POP THE MAN-PAGNE.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 10
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo get to the bottom of fake news with VIDEO OR DIDN'T HAPPEN, describe the joy that is a CROWDGASM, and see what happens when you take too much melatonin and go MELATONIC.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 824
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Jackass' Dave England shows Rob, Chanel, and Sterling what it takes to inspire a generation of "Poo Pros," gets careless with some "Bad Daddies" and the agony of getting "Butt Hurt."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 817

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 1010
programme.desc: Miss Teacher Bangs A Boy: Power goes to Cartman's head when he becomes "Dawg the Hallway Monitor". Meanwhile, Kyle is shocked to discover his little brother Ike and his teacher are at "it"! (S10, E10)

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 1011
programme.desc: Hell On Earth 2006: Satan has a Sweet 16 style party in L.A. on Halloween! The gang perform a ritual and manage to summon Biggie Smalls - who demands Butters helps him get to the party! (S10, E11)

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 1013
programme.desc: Go God Go XII: Cartman is stuck in the future, caught up in a battle between atheists and sea otters! And what will become of Richard Dawkins and Mrs. Garrison's love affair? (S10, E13)

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 1014
programme.desc: Stanley's Cup: In a parody of underdog sports films, Stan is sentenced to community service and ends up coaching the Park County Pee-Wee hockey team - can he turn these losers into winners? (S10, E14)

programme.title: South Park S25 Ep. 1
programme.desc: After failing to show respect for their teacher, PC Principal revokes Pyjama Day privileges for the entire 4th grade class on the most important day of the year.

programme.title: South Park S25 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Stan is horrified to realise that he's misinterpreted some of the greatest writing of all time and dedicates himself to curing his unconscious bias by reading The Lord of the Rings.

programme.title: South Park S25 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Cartman is furious with his mom when she tells him about her new job.

programme.title: South Park S25 Ep. 4
programme.desc: With world tensions escalating, a lot is riding on Butterâ€™s ability to crush the Russian competition in the all-important Under 10s Dressage Championship.

programme.title: South Park S25 Ep. 5
programme.desc: The boys find out that the joys of playing Airsoft come with the challenges of dealing with teenagers.

programme.title: South Park S25 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Butters is shocked to learn that people in South Park don't understand what St. Patrick's Day is really about.

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Cartman Gets An Anal Probe: Cartman dreams he has a close encounter with an alien. The other boys are convinced the dream was real, and that he has been the victim of an alien anal probe. (S1, E01)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: When Cartman's environmental essay wins a national contest, America's sweetheart, Kathie Lee Gifford, comes to South Park to present the award.

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: A weekend trip to experience the finer points of camping, fishing and blowing animals to smithereens is threatened by an erupting volcano.

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: An Elephant Makes Love To A Pig: Kyle calls in genetic engineer Dr. Mephisto to crossbreed his pet elephant and Cartman's pot-bellied pig in a bid to win a science competition. (S1, E05)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Death: Stan's ancient grandfather attempts to trick the boys into killing him. Meanwhile, the parents of South Park lobby a TV network to rid the airwaves of Terrance and Phillip. (S1, E06)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: A mishap at the morgue transforms the residents of South Park into brain-eating zombies and threatens the boys night of Trick-or-Treating.

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Thanksgiving Episode- Mistaking Cartman for a starving African child, government authorities send him to Ethiopia where he runs into Sally Struthers.

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Mr Hankey, The Christmas Poo: The Mayor decides to impose a holiday theme which won't offend anybody. Kyle tries to convince everyone that Mr Hankey (a singing Christmas poo) exists. (S1, E09)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Damien: The new kid in class persuades Jesus to do battle with his father, Satan, in the final battle of good versus evil. Cartman is livid to learn the bout clashes with his birthday. (S1, E10)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Tom's Rhinoplasty: The boys become lesbians to impress a new teacher, making Wendy jealous. Also, to his delight, Mr. Garrison's plastic surgery leaves him looking like David Hasselhoff. (S1, E11)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Mecha-Streisand: Cartman and Kyle fall out over a magic triangle they un-earth on an archaeological dig. The triangle yields the power to turn Barbra Streisand into a terrible monster. (S1, E12)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Cartman's Mum Is A Dirty S**t (1): Dr. Mephisto helps Cartman un-cover the truth about his dad's identity. The spotlight is on quite a few of South Park's male residents. Who could it be? (S1, E13)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Cartman's Mum Is Still A Dirty S**t (2): Dr Mephisto is shot before he reveals who Cartman's father is. Who exactly shot him? Meanwhile, the rest of the town try to deal with a blizzard. (S2, E02)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: When Barbrady resigns, anarchy ensues and the boys pitch in to help.

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Ike's Wee Wee: Kyle misunderstands what circumcision is and thinks he has to save Ike's penis from being cut off! Mr. Mackey is fired, and turns to drugs - "drugs are bad, m'kay?" (S2, E04)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Conjoined Fetus Lady: Kyle is terrified because he has to see the school nurse, who has a scary deformity. Meanwhile, the school dodgeball team goes to China - only Pip can save them now. (S2, E05)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: City On The Edge Of Forever: The school bus ends up perched on the edge of a ravine after it crashes in a snowstorm. Must be time for some flashbacks then! Can these memories be trusted? (S2, E07)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Summer Sucks: The boys' plans for 4th of July celebrations are ruined when the State bans fireworks. It's up to Uncle Jimbo and Ned to save the day with a little trip down Meheeco way. (S2, E08)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Chef's Chocolate Salty Balls: The Sundance Film Festival is in South Park but it's not long before Hollywood culture is over running the town and polluting the sewer where Mr Hankey lives. (S2, E09)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Chickenpox: The boys are sent to Kenny's for the night, so they can all get chickenpox. The boys decide to get even on their parents by hiring a prostitute with mouth herpes to infect them. (S2, E10)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Roger Ebert Should Lay Off The Fatty Foods: The boys are taken to the planetarium but Cartman has other ideas and decides to audition to sing the Cheesy Poofs song on their next advert. (S2, E11)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Clubhouses: Stan and Kyle build a clubhouse, so they can play truth or dare with Wendy and Bebe. Cartman and Kenny decide to build their own rival clubhouse based on The Ewoks Village. (S2, E12)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Cow Days: The boys try to win Terrance and Phillip dolls at the carnival but a dodgy carnie keeps changing the rules - time to call "shenanigans"! Cartman dates Leonardo DiCaprio. (S2, E13)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Chef Aid: Chef realises that Alanis Morissette's (fictional) hit song "Stinky Britches" is a song that he wrote years ago but the record company aren't interested in giving him any credit. (S2, E14)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Spooky Fish: When Stan is given a fish by his Aunt, he has a feeling there's something not quite right about it. Sure enough it's not long before there's evil goings on. (In spooky vision!) (S2, E15)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Merry Christmas, Charlie Manson!: Cartman's Uncle Howard escapes from prison with another inmate, Charlie Manson. The boys want to go see Mr Hankey at the mall but no one will take them. (S2, E16)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Gnomes (a.k.a. Underpants Gnomes): The boys must write an essay for school. Tweek suggests they write about gnomes that visit him every night and steal his pants. What will they discover? (S2, E17)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Rainforest Schmainforest: The boys go to the Costa Rican rainforest as a part of the "Getting Gay With Kids" choir tour, but Cartman is on a mission to cause havoc. Jennifer Aniston guests. (S3, E01)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Spontaneous Combustion: The citizens of South Park are randomly exploding and it's up to Stan to find the cause. Kyle discovers his dad is having problems with erectile dysfunction. (S3, E02)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: The Succubus (a.k.a. Chef's Mama): The boys discover that Chef has a new girl who has changed him from a free-spirited, soul-singing hipster to that of a mediocre, religious paper pusher. (S3, E03)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Jakovasaurs: While camping, the boys discover the last two Jakovasaurs (a parody of Jar Jar Binks) on the planet. Will the townsfolk welcome them with open arms or find them very annoying? (S3, E04)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Tweek vs. Craig: The boys coerce two of their classmates, Tweek and Craig, into a schoolyard fight. Craig learns martial arts with the aid of Cartman. Tweek is taught to box by Uncle Jimbo. (S3, E05)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 6
programme.desc: The Sexual Harassment Panda: After a school educational talk from Petey the Panda, Cartman decides to sue Stan for sexual harassment. Suing fever starts to grip the entire town! (S3, E06)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Cat O*gy (1): Stan's sister Shelley babysits Cartman and invites her unsuitable boyfriend, Skyler, to join her. Meanwhile Cartman's cat is on heat and it's not long before he's got company! (S3, E07)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Stan's parents drag him along to Mr. Mackey's meteor shower party, where he is sent down into the basement to play with Pip, Butters and Dougie.

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Jewbilee (3): As all of South Park waits for the meteor shower to begin, Kyle and Ike go into the wilderness for a Jew Scouts Jewbilee. Kenny tags along and takes on the king of the woods... (S3, E09)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Korn's Groovy Pirate Ghost Mystery: The boys are being plagued by the 5th graders and South Park is overrun by Pirate Ghosts. Nu-Metal band Korn must save the day! (Scooby-Doo parody). (S3, E10)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Chinpokomon: Stan, Cartman, and Kenny are caught up in the latest fad from Japan, a cartoon called Chinpokomon - but what is the secret plan behind the show's anti-American sentiments...? (S3, E11)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Hooked on Monkey Fonics: The boys compete against a couple of home schooled kids in South Park's annual spelling bee. (S3, E12)

programme.title: The Shadow Line S1 Ep. 7

programme.title: Above Suspicion S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Rookie DC Anna Travis investigates seven brutal murders. Clues link all to actor Alan Daniels, charming, famous and seemingly untouchable. Even Travis may not be immune to his allure.

programme.title: Above Suspicion S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: A girl is found murdered in a copycat of the Black Dahlia case. DC Anna Travis follows a trail of chilling clues to a powerful suspect, but can she prove it before he strikes again?

programme.title: Above Suspicion S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: DI Anna Travis returns, investigating the murder of ex-cop Frank Brandon. As secrets unravel, an autistic witness may hold the key to exposing a deadly web of lies.

programme.title: Above Suspicion S4 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Passed over for promotion, Langton leads the case of star Amanda Delany's murder. A crucifix, silent screams and a second death point to dark secrets in her past, and a killer still close.

programme.title: Above Suspicion S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Travis joins Alan Daniels on a date and grows more convinced of his innocence, but is it just another performance? And could he still have more of his story to reveal?

programme.title: Above Suspicion S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: The hunt for killer Charles Wickenham leads to dark family secrets, a torture cellar, and a shocking twist, his body found trapped in hiding. Justice, in the end, comes from the shadows.

programme.title: Above Suspicion S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Petrozzo dies from a forced fentanyl OD. Travis links it to a 30M stash stolen in Miami. A diary entry Godot leads her to Julia's ex, who may be a dangerous fugitive using an alias.

programme.title: Above Suspicion S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Amanda's lovers are questioned, one lost a crucifix, another's wife saw a man at the flat. Her toy rabbit and drugs are missing. Another body turns up, and secrets keep piling up.

programme.title: Above Suspicion S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Langton learns Wickenham abused both daughters, Emily and Justine, and killed in Black Dahlia style. Evidence from Gail and photos expose him; he dies trapped, likely by the protective housekeeper.

programme.title: Above Suspicion S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: David Rushton is found dead like Petrozzo fentanyl overdose, CCTV turned to the wall. A shaken Julia is questioned. A blurry CCTV image may reveal the killer, could it be Fitzpatrick?

programme.title: Above Suspicion S4 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Felicity Turner's body is found. Jeanie admits to holding Amanda's diary, linking Lester James as lover and pusher. CCTV reveals the killer. Langton learns of betrayal; Anna's promotion news arrives.

programme.title: Accused S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Special needs teacher Alison and her unemployed husband David are drifting apart. Though she initially rejects the advances of a charming work colleague, David does not believe her.

programme.title: Accused S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Young Frankie Nash joins the army to get off an assault charge and is sent to Afghanistan with best mate Peter, who only joined up to impress his war hero father and goes to pieces under fire.

programme.title: Accused S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Teenager Rob Ryland is killed in the warehouse where he works. Rob's parents Helen and Frank start to become suspicious when they learn that Rob's boss has been instructed by his lawyer to hold back the body.

programme.title: Accused S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: After his little girl is molested in a park, Kenny assaults the man answering the culprit's description. But when the man dies, Kenny's attempts to lie to the police about his whereabouts only arouse the further suspicions of dogged inspector Warren.

programme.title: Accused S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Taxi driver Liam's gambling habit prevents him from buying a reward present for his daughter when she passes her exams, so he burgles a fare's house but becomes obsessed with the house owner.

programme.title: Accused S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Mo Murray runs a hair salon with her friend Sue on an estate riven by gang violence. When Sue's son Sean is shot dead, Mo spearheads a local group informing on drug dealers in the area.

programme.desc: Pat's efforts to persuade Rosie that Sam will be taken away from her fall on deaf ears.

programme.desc: Leila conducts a search and finds some worrying objects.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S5 Ep. 1
programme.desc: An alcoholic bookie regrets that he wasn't a better father to his son, Pip, critically wounded in South Vietnam. A visit to an amusement park gives them both a second chance.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S5 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Boxing robot "Battling Maxo" breaks down before the scheduled bout, forcing his manager to take its place.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S5 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Mr. Wilson believes he sees a gremlin on the wing of the commercial aircraft he is taking back home... from the sanitarium, where he has been committed for six months after a mental breakdown during a similar flight.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S5 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Patrick Thomas McNulty, a long-winded and self-absorbed know-it-all, is given a fantastic device which brings literal meaning to the expression "stop the world; I want to get off."

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S5 Ep. 5
programme.desc: A dejected jockey wants to be tall.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S5 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Erich is displeased when his wife buys an expensive doll for his step-daughter. He becomes even more displeased when the doll tells him it doesn't like him!

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S5 Ep. 7
programme.desc: A mysterious guardian helps a tiny community survive after the Bomb destroys much of the Earth.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S5 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Barbara accidentally causes her cruel Uncle Simon's death. His will stipulates that she must care for his latest invention - a robot. The robot begins to take on Uncle Simon's traits.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S5 Ep. 9
programme.desc: The lone survivors of two annihilated worlds are stranded on a distant planet.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S5 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Three National Guardsmen explore the site of Custer's Last Stand and encounter mysterious phenomenon that hint at the original battle occurring just out of sight.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S5 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Trying to keep up with his younger wife, Harmon convinces his brother to inject him with an experimental youth serum.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S5 Ep. 12
programme.desc: An old man fears that he will die if his grandfather clock stops running.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S5 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Bunny receives a ring from her fan club in her home town. In the ring she sees the faces of people from her hometown telling her she's needed there so she returns home.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S5 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Driving home one rainy evening, Oliver Pope accidentally hits a boy on a bicycle. Pope flees the scene, determined to hide his guilt, but his car has other ideas.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S5 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Before leaving on his mission, an astronaut meets a woman. They fall in love...

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S5 Ep. 16
programme.desc: A man finds that he can trade anything he has, including youth and personality, with anybody else.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S5 Ep. 17
programme.desc: In a future where everyone must undergo an operation at the age of 19 to make them identical to everyone else, one woman desperately tries to hang onto her own identity.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S5 Ep. 18
programme.desc: Three tough-looking men on motorcycles disrupt a peaceful suburb when they move in. Yet the neighbors could never imagine just how dangerous these men really are.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S5 Ep. 19
programme.desc: Mysterious phone calls haunt a disabled woman.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S5 Ep. 20
programme.desc: A computer technician must deal with the queen of all femme fatales: a computer named Agnes who wreaks havoc on his love life.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S5 Ep. 21
programme.desc: After being chased on horseback by a terrifying, unidentified figure in black, Anne Henderson faces the biggest decision of her life.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S5 Ep. 22
programme.desc: A Confederate spy is spared death when the rope meant to hang him miraculously breaks. Or does it?

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S5 Ep. 23

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S5 Ep. 24
programme.desc: A cheating husband sees his secret revealed and its horrible consequences on his just-repaired TV set.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S5 Ep. 25
programme.desc: A dying man demands his family wear masks that he's given them at a Mardi Gras party.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S5 Ep. 26
programme.desc: On the day an unpopular idealist is to be executed for the killing of a racist bully, the townsfolk are shocked to see the skies have turned pitch black.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S5 Ep. 27
programme.desc: A man's wish to listen to loud noise backfires.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S5 Ep. 28
programme.desc: A ventriloquist's dummy goads him into committing burglaries.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S5 Ep. 29
programme.desc: Major Ivan Kuchenko is trapped inside a hotel room with Commissar Vassiloff, a hitman, and Boris, his assistant, in the room across the street. Vassiloff has planted a bomb in the room and Ivan must find it within three hours or be blown to bits.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S5 Ep. 30
programme.desc: Bob and Millie wake up to find they are in a strange town. Everything appears to be props - trees, animals even cars.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S5 Ep. 31
programme.desc: A World War II veteran and a Japanese-American gardener battle each other over a war that ended more than 20 years ago.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S5 Ep. 32

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S5 Ep. 33
programme.desc: A factory CEO replaces human workers with machines.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S5 Ep. 34
programme.desc: A singer's song becomes tragically real.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S5 Ep. 36

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Mike Ferris finds himself in a town strangely devoid of people. But despite the emptiness, he has the odd feeling that he's being watched...

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: A street salesman cleverly eludes Death. But if he lives, a little girl must die in his place.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: A has-been, drunk gunslinger finds his fast-draw abilities magically restored.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: An aging, former movie star lives and dreams in the past, constantly watching her old movies alone in her room.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Martin Sloan, driving through the country, leaves his car and starts to walk toward his hometown, Homewood. He finds things exactly as they were when he was a child. He soon realizes he's gone back in time.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: A hypochondriac exchanges his soul for immortality and indestructibility.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Corry is stranded on an asteroid after being convicted of a crime. He receives as a present a robot who looks, sounds, and acts like a real woman.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: A bank teller, Henry Bemis, longs for time alone to read books. He gets his wish...

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: A man is terrified of falling asleep for fear he might die.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S1 Ep. 10
programme.desc: In 1942, a German wonders why he's on the deck of a British steamship, with no memory of how he got there, and an overwhelming sense of impending doom.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S1 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Three astronauts have returned from this first space flight. Major Gart is hospitalized with a broken leg. The other two, Colonels Harrington and Forbes head for a bar. Harrington gets a strange feeling…

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Roger and Lana's marriage is rocky at best. Lana plots for her lover to kill Roger while he is away for the night on business so that she can have all of his money.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 2
programme.desc: While driving, David tells his wife Laura that he wants a divorce. Laura becomes hysterical and begins to cry and hit him. Trying to fight off his wife's attacks, David loses control of the car and flies into an intersection.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Jim, the hospital janitor, teaches Dr. Sloan some magic tricks. Jim is a whiz at magic and can nimbly manipulate a medallion between his fingers.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 4
programme.desc: George, a schizophrenic homeless man, shows up on a beach prophesizing about death. The couple in the nearby beach apartment, Cynthia and Ethan, threaten to call the police.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 5
programme.desc: When Steve Sloan is hospitalized for injuries sustained in a high-speed car chase, he wakes in a haze and watches with a blurred vision what looks like another patient being stabbed by one of the medical staff in his room.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Nurse Stacy Bradshaw tells Dr. Sloan about her skydiving escapades, and he politely turns down her extreme thrill-seeking invitation to come along.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Dr. Travis catches Dr. Sloan in his office, settling in with a bowl of popcorn to watch a reality television show, "Hot House," a "Big Brother" and "Real World" type series.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Mark's friends Stanley and Tammy have decided to preview Tammy's new fashion line at their wedding.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 9
programme.desc: At a spiritual retreat, Beth Scarburough confronts Father Dominick about his failed friendship with her husband, Matt. She pleads for him to make amends with his former friend.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Cocky medical student, Hunter Koskov, coerces his classmates, Max and Jenny, to experiment with each other by inducing "death."

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Amanda does a guest spot as a nurse on the soap opera, where she serves as a medical consultant. Star actress Thalia faints during a scene and is rushed to the emergency room.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 12

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan questions old friend and newspaper baron Barclay about the security company.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 14

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 15

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 17

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 18
programme.desc: While Amanda Bentley visits Martin, a good friend, and benefactor of a visiting Communist Chinese dance troupe, Tako, the star dancer drops dead.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 19

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 20
programme.desc: As Lt. Steve Sloan and his partner, Cheryl, pick up their favorite strawberry milkshakes, Steve is distracted by a beautiful woman.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 21
programme.desc: Calvin Laird, Mark and Steve's neighbor, threatens his girlfriend violently when she challenges his mean behavior. His repeated playing of loud music bothers the Sloans to no end.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 22
