programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 59
programme.desc: Tonight, Gary and George work their magic on lamb shanks, beef kofta, double backed cheese soufflÃ© and crepe suzette.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 60
programme.desc: In the mystery box challenge, contestants have to make their own sausages. There's chaos in the kitchen as they get to grips with turning a slab of meat into their own snag. None have used a sausage maker before, and it's not as easy as it looks.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 61
programme.desc: The two bottom from last nights Invention Challenge face a Pressure Test. On the menu, perhaps the most complex and difficult dish so far; a pannacotta with macaroons, ganache and a passionfruit slick.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 62
programme.desc: Celebrity chef Adrian Richardson, from Melbourne's La Luna restaurant goes up against the MasterChef winning contestant tonight.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 63
programme.desc: The contestants have $100 to buy ingredients and then race against the clock to create a dish that they hope will impress the panel, consisting of some of the founders of Australian cuisine.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 64
programme.desc: Today, the bottom two performers compete for their lives as they engage in the sudden death Taste Test. One wrong guess and they're going home. Tonight, the dish is Gary's Sri Lankan Curry.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 65
programme.desc: Gary and George take the competitors through the Friday night cooking lesson. On the menu this week: sausages with red wine reduction; Greek style baked beans; roast salmon and pancetta; and chocolate and nut cigars.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 66
programme.desc: Just six contestants have made it to the final week. From 7500 people who originally auditioned, one of these six will become Australia's first MasterChef. In the first of the week's high pressured challenges, the contestants must cook on a budget of $10.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 67
programme.desc: A host of Australia's most renowned chefs join the MasterChef team to help select the most worthy contestant for the title. Acclaimed Sydney chef Luke Mangan is a guest judge on tonight's show as the week's eliminations begin.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 68
programme.desc: Matt Moran returns to MasterChef Australia as the five remaining contestants enter the first invention test of the week. Along with the MasterChef judges, Matt has the responsibility of reducing five contestants to four.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 69
programme.desc: Bill Grainger is the special guest chef tonight and the four remaining contestants compete in a pressure test. The two weakest performers go into a sudden death taste test round where one of them will be eliminated.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 70
programme.desc: Donna Hay is Australia's best selling cookbook author. Tonight, the contestants must prepare their ultimate three course meal for Donna and the judges to taste. Just two contestants can get through to the final round of MasterChef Australia.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 71
programme.desc: In the final Masterclass of this series, and with the final of MasterChef Australia just around the corner, Sarah and the judges look back over the incredible journey that our top 20 contestants have come on since their very first auditions.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 72
programme.desc: Two contestants remain in the competition, and tonight, one will become MasterChef Australia. These two amateur cooks have been on an amazing journey since their first audition and both are equally deserving of their place.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S9 Ep. 1
programme.desc: The heat is on as MasterChef Australia returns for 2017. A fresh group of home cooks from around the country will eagerly tackle challenges that will see one of them take home the title & $250,000.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S9 Ep. 2
programme.desc: After a record-breaking first-round cook that saw an extraordinary 20 aprons handed out, only four aprons remain. Who will have what it takes to impress the judges?

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S9 Ep. 3
programme.desc: In the third and final round of the judge's auditions, six contestants are vying for the final apron, which will secure them a place in the top 24.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S9 Ep. 4
programme.desc: The Top 24 contestants enter the kitchen for their first mystery box challenge. Later, the bottom 4 will cook off in an elmination challenge. Who will be the first to leave MasterChef Australia 2017?

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S9 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Each judge has placed three of their favourite ingredients into the mystery box and contestants will have 75 minutes to create a remarkable dish for a chance at immunity.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S9 Ep. 7
programme.desc: The three contestants with the least impressive dishes from the invention test face off in the pressure test. To survive they must keep up with Gary Mehigan as he prepares his classic roast chicken.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S9 Ep. 8
programme.desc: The top three contestants from the invention test now compete in creating a family meal for four in half-an-hour. The winner will then take on a professional chef for a chance at immunity.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S9 Ep. 9
programme.desc: The contestants gather at Gradi, one of Melbourne's leading Italian restaurants before being split into two teams who must prepare four dishes for 250 hungry diners to avoid the elimination challenge.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S6 Ep. 9
programme.desc: When winning Reward also doubles as winning Immunity, all bets are off, especially when the winners will also score champagne and bar snacks. With both Tribes attending Tribal Council, fireworks ensue

programme.title: Australian Survivor S6 Ep. 10
programme.desc: One Tribe thinks they have it in the bag, but a surprise outcome means full bellies and a good night's sleep for the overall winners. With firm alliances rearing their head at a heated Tribal council

programme.title: Australian Survivor S6 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Even when you think your private conversation won't be heard by others, it almost always is. The other Castaways use the overheard information to their advantage amongst their own Tribal alliance.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S6 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Desperation is setting in on one Tribe with members gunning for one person in particular. Now to flush their idol! And a good old fashioned blindside sees one Castaway scratching their head.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S6 Ep. 13
programme.desc: It's the moment the remaining Castaways have been waiting for, Tribe merge! Not everyone knows who to trust and with a couple of Idols in play, tonight's Tribal Council is anyone's game.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S6 Ep. 14
programme.desc: In an Immunity Challenge with a twist, there are three Immunity Idols up for grabs. Whoever scores one will see Tribal Council will swing in their favour...or will it?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S6 Ep. 15
programme.desc: The Immunity Challenge tests our hangry Castaways on spelling and balancing, with a challenge beast setting their eyes on the prize. Plus, At Tribal Council, a double agent is outed!

programme.title: Australian Survivor S6 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Tensions within Brawn start a double blindside, but there's an importance in a blindside of picking the right target at the right time.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S6 Ep. 17
programme.desc: It's Day 34 in the Australian Outback, and the feeling at camp is excitement for Brains, who now rule the camp.The biggest KEY to playing Survivor is to keep your closest allies safe.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S6 Ep. 18
programme.desc: George and Cara have stuck by each other through thick and thin, however, when the rest of the Tribe realise, will the King and Queen of Survivor's reign be over?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S6 Ep. 19
programme.desc: George survives tribal by the skin of his teeth to regain the majority, but his ability to stay in the game lies in the hands of one person, Wai.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S6 Ep. 20
programme.desc: Dani & Flick are on the bottom of the pack, but they are two strong physical & social threats who are here to fight. Will George's kingdom crumble under the persuasive powers of the remaining Brawn?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S6 Ep. 21
programme.desc: Dani concedes that the only way to get ahead in this game is to exploit some cracks in the majority alliance, but that would mean trusting someone who has betrayed her in the past.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S6 Ep. 22
programme.desc: Day 44, The four former brains have formed an impenetrable alliance leaving Flick, the only remaining brawn on the outer. Little do they know she's getting ready to shake things up!

programme.title: Australian Survivor S6 Ep. 23
programme.desc: As we near the end of the competition, will the game's longest lasting power couple, finally have to turn on each other?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S6 Ep. 24
programme.desc: Who will outwit...outplay...and outlast the other to become the ultimate Sole Survivor in the final episode of Brains Vs. Brawn?

programme.title: Survivor US S26 Ep. 1
programme.desc: While returning castaways blow in with boiling blood and brazen hearts, fit first-time players give their Survivor idols a run for the million dollars.

programme.title: Survivor US S26 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Reeling from a merciless elimination at the last Tribal, Brandon targets Dawn as the leader of what he sees as an unsuitable vote.

programme.title: Survivor US S26 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Instead of rejoicing in his safety after the last Tribal, Shamar goes on the offense and attacks Matt and his fellow castaways.

programme.title: Survivor US S26 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Eddie and Reynold have a war of words with their tribe after another alliance member is sent packing.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S7 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Bobby and Danni have a row. Arg plays his biggest gig yet.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S7 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Gemma holds a singles night. Joey becomes a superhero. The boys become spies and Charlie drops a bombshell.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S7 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Arg changes his image. The girls have their first netball match. Gemma gets knocked back and Bobby tries his luck in lederhosen.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S8 Ep. 1
programme.desc: There’s double trouble, the patter of tiny feet and lots of real-life drama, plus a birthday night to remember for all the wrong reasons for Lucy & Mario

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S8 Ep. 2
programme.desc: As the dust settles on Sunday’s explosive episode, what next for Lucy and Mario? Gemma launches her brand new diet club, Bobby’s quest to become a dad continues plus could there be the patter of tint feet for Lauren and Kirk…?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S8 Ep. 3
programme.desc: All the latest drama from Essex as Lucy searches for the truth about Mario, Gemma’s Diet Club continues on horseback, Joey starts recruiting staff for his brand new shop, and could it be third time lucky for Kirk and Lauren…?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S8 Ep. 4
programme.desc: All the latest drama and gossip from the real lives of our uber glam, super tanned friends from Essex. Lucy heads off on a mystery date… Danny Walia tries his luck with a visit to a model agency.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S8 Ep. 5
programme.desc: All the latest drama and gossip from the real lives of our uber glam, super tanned friends from Essex. After their twitter rant – what next for Lucy and Mario? The cast celebrate Mother’s Day Essex-style,.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S8 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Tom Pearce takes new girl Abi on a surprise date. Arg comes to the rescue of a new homeless Gemma. And tempers fray between Bobby and Gemma at Ricky’s Comedy night.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S8 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Arg enlists the services of Charlie and Bobby for his St Patrick’s night party. Gemma faces a few home truths. Sparks fly as Jasmin and Ricky come to blows, and tongues are wagging as some hot new boys come to town…

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S8 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Ricky & Little Chris bond with the new hunks Dan and James. Gemma attempts to build bridges - but can she and Bobby ever make up? Frankie and Chloe bury the hatchet and invite Sam and Joey around for a family bonding dinner party.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S8 Ep. 9
programme.desc: It’s the day of Joey’s long awaited shop launch… how will it go? Will anyone turn up? Will he work out how to use the till? Is there enough stock? How will he cope? Chloe tells Sam a few home truths… Plus – Mario’s back in town…

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S8 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Mario and Chris have unfinished business. Chloe has a heart to heart with Sam. Jasmin and Abi double date James and Dan Joey, Arg, Diags and Tom P organize a mole stakeout in Billie’s garden.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S8 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Jess & Ricky have a heart to heart about their relationship. Lucy is back in town. The cast head to an 80’s Roller Disco and Joey has a HUGE secret to share with Billie…

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S8 Ep. 12
programme.desc: In a drama and romance-filled series finale, the boys face up to each other on the five-a-side football pitch and Joey jets Sam off to Dubai to pop the big question…

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S9 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Team TOWIE is back and heading to the Costa-Del-Essex for a two part Marbella special – expect plenty of sun, sea, sangria and shenanigans as everyone’s favourites hit the beach and enjoy the nightlife on their annual Spanish jaunt.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S9 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Part two of the TOWIE Marbella special, with tears, tantrums, drama, gossip and plenty of real tan action…|Part two of the TOWIE Marbella special, with tears, tantrums, drama, gossip and plenty of real tan action…

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S9 Ep. 3
programme.desc: As the sun sets on Marbella, Team TOWIE is back in Essex and the fallout from the Spanish expedition begins. Is it the beginning of the end for Joey and Sam? Will Lucy and Dan be more than just a holiday romance?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S9 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Loves young dream, will Diags finally find love? Lil Chris better watch out because Mario is on the war path. Is it make up or break up for TOWIE’s golden couple Joey and Sam?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S9 Ep. 5
programme.desc: All the latest drama and gossip from the real lives of our uber glam, super tanned friends from Essex. It’s a Father’s Day to remember with a big revelation from Dan. Chloe and Billie come to blows over Joey and Sam.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S9 Ep. 6
programme.desc: All the latest drama and gossip from the real life Orange County that is Essex. Is it the end of the road for Joey and Sam? Lucy and dad-to-be Dan have a heart to heart. Ricky has a big confession for Jess,.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S9 Ep. 7
programme.desc: How are Joey and Sam adjusting to single life? Jess is on a mission to find out the truth about Ricky’s infidelity. Plus a there’s romantic night in for Diags and Abi…

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S9 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Ricky and Jess are reeling from Mario’s revelations and there’s an awkward showdown with the Wrights. James asks Sam to a day at the races. Bobby, Charlie and Gemma hit Essex Pride, and could there be family troubles brewing for Ferne and Charlie…?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S9 Ep. 9
programme.desc: It’s Chloe’s first day of work experience at Essex Style Magazine. Ricky tries to rekindle the romance with Jess - but will he succeed? Mario and Lucy go head to head over Bentley.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S9 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Joey and the boys take to the tennis courts, Ricky tries to make a mend with the Wright family over a game of golf. Sam organizes a slap-up dinner at which Lucy discovers Dan is not as squeaky clean.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S9 Ep. 11
programme.desc: In the penultimate episode of the current series, there has been a Murder in Essex and Abi is planning a Murder Mystery Birthday party. Jess has organized a single ladies 'hen again' party for mum Carol.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S9 Ep. 12
programme.desc: In the final episode of the current series it's a glorious day for an Essex Wedding as Carol and Mark Wright celebrate their 30th anniversary by renewing their wedding vows. Lucy and Mario have a heart-to-heart.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: The uber glam world of Essex will act as the backdrop to the series: nail bars, wine bars, spray tans, flash cars, big watches – these people live it large and just can’t get enough drama into their lives.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: A reality drama based on the gorgeous and glamorous characters that live it large in Essex. Tonight ….. Will Kirk go through with his tattoo? Will Mark turn up for Lauren’s birthday party?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: In this episode, we witness the fall out from Lauren’s party. How will Mark’s speed dating event turn out? Will Amy get to live the dream and become a top model? Can Kirk woo Amy and get the girl?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: In this episode, will Kirk’s special date for Amy seal their romance? How does Mark cope when temptation and jealousy enter the frame?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Arg prepares for his performance at the 1960’s themed party but is thrown to hear that Lydia will be making an appearance

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Essex Fashion Week arrives, but who will win the prize for being the most glamorous Essex girl. Sam? Amy? Jessica?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: On this episode of The Only Way Is Essex it’s VIP night at the opening of Mark’s new club

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: In this episode of the Only Way Is Essex, follow the tears, the tantrums and the triumphs of Amy, Mark, Sam, Kirk and Jessica.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S5 Ep. 504
programme.desc: The Geordie Tour of Europe is back on as the gang are off to Prague for banter, birds, & booze. The girls get their guns out at the shooting range whilst the boys visit the local strip clubs (S5, ep4)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S5 Ep. 505
programme.desc: The gang return from Prague to a turbulent Toon. The house is in total meltdown as Charlotte and Gary finally come to blows, and it looks like it could be the end for Vicky and Ricci (S5, ep5)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S5 Ep. 506
programme.desc: Charlotte returns to the Geordie Shore house just in time to join the rest of the gang on a Geordie Tour of Barcelona. Our favourite Geordies bathe in the Spanish sun, sea, sex and sangria.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S5 Ep. 507
programme.desc: The gang return from Barcelona with Charlotte's declaration of love for Gary still hanging in the air and Vicky set for a final showdown with Ricci (S5, ep7)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S5 Ep. 508
programme.desc: With the gang cooling off after the biggest fight in the show's history, there's an icy atmosphere between the boys and the girls as they're off to the Alps for their final Geordie Tour (S5, ep8)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S6 Ep. 601
programme.desc: Holly and James still haven't put their differences behind them and are a war zone waiting to happen, Gary and Scott are on a mission to pull every girl in Sydney. (S6, ep1)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S6 Ep. 602
programme.desc: The group are in high spirits as they get a surprise visit from Jay. Charlotte is still coming to terms with her feelings for Gaz. James' battle with Holly is set to continue. (S6, ep2)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S6 Ep. 603
programme.desc: James and Gaz come to blows over pulling and Gaz is forced to leave the house. Vicky tashes on and Holly gets up close and personal with the one and only Scotty T. (S6, ep3)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S6 Ep. 604
programme.desc: Whilst the fittest guy in Australia sends the girls into a spin, Scotty and Gaz square up as nightclubbing gets nasty. House destruction sees Gary head into the bush. (S6, ep4)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S6 Ep. 605
programme.desc: An anger management session is arranged for the group, and Charlotte lets out all her negative feelings towards Gaz. Sophie and Joel gets too drunk and embarrass the group on a night out. (S6, ep5)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S6 Ep. 606
programme.desc: With Charlotte returning from the Bush a new woman, the housemates lay down the law for Scotty, slapping him with a drinking ban hoping that he will stop smashing up the house. (S6, ep6)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S6 Ep. 607
programme.desc: James and Gary come to blows which sends shockwaves through the house and Charlotte's heart strings are pulled for Gary as she offers him support. (S6 ep7)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S6 Ep. 608
programme.desc: As their time in Sydney comes to an end, the singles make it their mission to have a storming night in the Whitsundays. The coupled housemates have raised suspicions. Last in the series. (S6, ep8)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S7 Ep. 701
programme.desc: The Geordies are back where they belong, in Newcastle, for a jaw-dropping summer season of partying, pulling, bucking, necking on and getting mortal. (S7, ep1)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S7 Ep. 702
programme.desc: The Geordies are reeling from an explosive fallout following new girl Marnie's arrival. A night out ends with Scott completely losing his cool and trying to smash the house up. (S7, ep2)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S7 Ep. 703
programme.desc: It is Holly's birthday, the Geordies celebrate as only they know how - with a mint house party. Meanwhile there's a tiny tragedy in the house, leading to an unexpected funeral on the beach. (S7, ep3)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S7 Ep. 704
programme.desc: The house is rocked to the core as Charlotte and Holly have an explosive falling out with new girl Marnie. Scott and Gary's friendship is pushed to the limit. A former housemate returns. (S7, ep4)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S7 Ep. 706
programme.desc: Gary and Holly are still furious at the way Charlotte's boyfriend treated her. Marnie decides she'll put out if Scott behaves himself. (S7, ep6)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S8 Ep. 801
programme.desc: The Geordies are back in the Toon for more partying, necking on and getting mortal. Everyone's buzzin' as a new lad arrives to join the crew and Marnie promises to stay away from the boys. (S8, ep1)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S8 Ep. 802
programme.desc: Gary gets jealous when Marnie flirts with new boy Aaron. Vicky returns to the house, and there's the first ever Tash-On Tours as the Geordies put their own spin on singles nights. (S8, ep2)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S8 Ep. 803
programme.desc: Charlotte's back! And her arrival couldn't have come at a worse time. New lad Aaron wins a date with Holly after her challenge, but he reveals he's actually got a thing for Vicky. (S8, ep3)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S8 Ep. 804
programme.desc: With Charlotte back in the house, all eyes are on Gary and Marnie and whether they'll decide to continue sleeping together. (S8, ep4)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S8 Ep. 805
programme.desc: Things kick off in the house as Aaron hears Vicky and the girls slagging him off on the eve of his third date with Vicky. (S8,ep5)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S8 Ep. 806
programme.desc: New boy Kyle gets properly settled into the house by spending the night with Holly, and the Geordies take Tash on Tours international as they jet off to Reykjavik, Iceland for some partying. (S8, ep6)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S8 Ep. 807
programme.desc: After checking out the local guys, girls and geysers in Iceland, the Geordies head back to the Toon, where it all kicks off as Aaron and Scott find out the truth about Gary and Marnie. (S8, ep7)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S8 Ep. 808
programme.desc: Will Aaron and Marnie finally get together, and will Scott and Gary make up? Meanwhile, Charlotte and Holly announce Geordie Shore's first-ever wedding. (S8, ep8)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S9 Ep. 901
programme.desc: Buzzin'! Our favourite party animals are back! Everyone is shocked when Vicky gets a promotion and becomes their boss. Holly tries to stay classy by not jumping into bed with Kyle. (S9, ep1)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S9 Ep. 902
programme.desc: Holly has a house party but there's a massive kick-off between the lads when Marnie tries to make Aaron jealous by necking on with Kyle. (S9, ep2)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 108
programme.desc: The summer's winding down, but the drama doesn't stop. Pauly's got a stalker and a fight lands another roommate in jail. (S1, ep8)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 109
programme.desc: Ronnie's released from his night in jail. Snooki's upset after a run in with an ex. The housemates wrap things up at the Shore, but not before one final hot tub hook up. (S1, ep9)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 111
programme.desc: Questions are answered when Snooki, The Situation, JWOWW, DJ Pauly D, Angelina, Ronnie, Sammi and Vinny return for more fights and insights into what happened down at the Jersey Shore. (S1, ep11)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 112
programme.desc: Every summer, thousands of kids head to the Jersey Shore to take part in that East Coast rite of passage: The Share House. Jersey Shore captures that phenomenon.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 113
programme.desc: Every summer, thousands of kids head to the Jersey Shore to take part in that East Coast rite of passage: The Share House. Jersey Shore captures that phenomenon.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 201
programme.desc: The Jersey Shore crew is headed to Miami! They are shocked by the surprise arrival of former housemate, Angelina, and the drama picks up right where it left off at the seaside. (S2, ep1)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 202
programme.desc: Sammi tries to figure out what Ronnie really did at the club the night before. When Angelina interrupts Pauly's game, we see a whole new side of the usually calm Pauly D. (S2, ep2)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 203
programme.desc: Angelina apologises to the girls. But back at the house, Mike, Vinny and Pauly have a close encounter with grenades in the hot tub, while Ron continues to creep behind Sammi's back. (S2, ep3)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 204
programme.desc: Ron's bad behaviour puts Snooki, Angelina and JWOWW in a tough spot. Together the girls decide to write an 'anonymous' letter to Sammi and finally reveal the entire truth. (S2, ep4)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 205
programme.desc: Sammi finds Snooki and Jenni's 'anonymous' letter, and this time it's really over with Ronnie. Mike, Vinny and Pauly ('MVP') have their hands full, juggling four girls in one night! (S2, ep5)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 206
programme.desc: The anonymous note causes tension between the girls, culminating in a full-blown cat-fight. And after sharing a night in bed with Vinny, Snooki reveals a not-so-little known fact. (S2, ep6)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 207
programme.desc: The roommates deal with the aftermath of the fight. Angelina starts dating Jose, a guy from the club; Jenni and Snooki clean up the smush room in preparation for Snooki's hook-up. (S2, ep7)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 208
programme.desc: When news gets out that Angelina and Vinny hooked up, Mike threatens to spill the beans to Jose. Vinny and Pauly find the girls of their dreams, but one of them will be heartbroken. (S2, ep8)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 209
programme.desc: Things go south for Angelina when the house learns that she slept with Jose after smushing Vinnie, but trouble really ensues when she gets too close to a guy Snooki hooked up with. (S2, ep9)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 210
programme.desc: Mike reunites with his Canadian hottie, providing entertainment for the whole house. But when Angelina tells her roommates how she really feels, she pushes Snooki into a frenzy. (S2, ep10)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 211
programme.desc: With Angelina gone, Snooki thinks it's time that she and Jenni bury the hatchet with Sam but Snooki's happiness is short-lived as Mark becomes increasingly belligerent with her. (S2, ep11)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 212
programme.desc: Everyone is frustrated with Mike's poor game after he gets them kicked out of a club, gets the car towed, nearly burns down the house and fails as a wingman for Pauly D - twice! (S2, ep12)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 213
programme.desc: Pauly D and Vinnie have final dates with their Miami girls, and Sam and Ronnie can't stop fighting. Meanwhile, Jenni stirs things up between the boys, leading to a dramatic final night. (S2, ep13)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 214
programme.desc: The cast is back together to dish the dirt on Miami - from bromances and romances, to the infamous note and the fights that followed! (S2, ep14)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 301
programme.desc: Leftover tension from Miami spills over to Seaside when unresolved issues among the girls explode on the first night. And new roommate Deena gets naked in front of The Situation! Series 3, Episode 1.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 302
programme.desc: The first night's fight causes tension in the house. Ronnie & Sammi keep isolating themselves, but things really explode when Ronnie decides to chill with the other housemates. Series 3, Episode 2.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 303
programme.desc: Sammi decides to make peace with Snooki and Deena. JWOWW runs into her old flame Roger and sparks fly. Meanwhile, Snooki gets arrested for public intoxication. Series 3, Episode 3.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 304
programme.desc: After Snooki is arrested, she becomes depressed... until she meets a new guy. Denna meets Ronnie's stunt double. Meanwhile, JWOWW's relationship with Tom comes to a dramatic end. Series 3, Episode 4.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 305
programme.desc: Ronnie and JWOWW make up, leading to Sammi punching Ronnie in the face. Vinny picks up a girl with an overbearing family, and The Situation learns Deena's dirty little secret. Series 3, Episode 5.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 306
programme.desc: Ronnie's over-drinking causes some painful side effects, Snooki meets a guy who may or may not be engaged, and Pauly D makes peace with an old nemesis. Series 3, Episode 6.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 307
programme.desc: Ronnie and Sammi's tumultuous relationship finally comes to an end, but when Ronnie destroys everything Sammi owns, she must decide whether or not to leave the Shore. Series 3, Episode 7.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 308
programme.desc: Ronnie feels like he has no friends left at the Shore after Sammi leaves & the housemates aren't sympathetic to him. Meanwhile, Mike tries to hook up with Pauly's ex-girlfriend! Series 3, Episode 8.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 309
programme.desc: Snooki's summer of hookups comes back to haunt her, and Mike pulls a big prank on Deena & Snooki... but the rest of the guys have the last laugh, leaving for dinner without him. Series 3, Episode 9.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 310
programme.desc: Sammi returns to the house & Ronnie is speechless. Snooki's feelings for Vinny continue to grow. Mike hooks up with a girl who he says smells like cheese, but is it just a prank? Series 3, Episode 10.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 311
programme.desc: Vinny & Pauly take a road trip to Staten Island, Jenni fears Roger's more than a rebound, & Mike reveals Sammi's shady ways, making Ronnie question his love. Series 3, Episode 11.

programme.title: The Hills S3 Ep. 28
programme.desc: In the season finale, Audrina feels shut out by Lauren's close friendship with Lo, and wants to move out. Lauren makes a heartfelt attempt to patch things up with Audrina, but it may be too late.

programme.title: The Hills S4 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Lauren and Lo throw Audrina a birthday party, Lauren tries to make a good impression on a new boy, and a visit from Heidi's sister Holly threatens Spencer and Heidi's relationship.

programme.title: The Hills S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Lauren runs into Spencer at Stephanie's birthday, Kelly Cutrone fires someone at People's Revolution and Whitney has to step up to fill the void, and Lauren's relationship with Doug may be moving a little too fast.

programme.title: The Hills S4 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Lauren realizes that the chemistry she felt for Doug may no longer be there, Whitney is nervous about heading to New York and finds herself on a date with a male model, Spencer tries to cut Stephanie out of his life.

programme.title: The Hills S4 Ep. 4
programme.desc: A blowout trip to Vegas breaks down when Audrina snubs Lauren, Brody brings up Stephanie's past, and the boys end up in jail.

programme.title: The Hills S4 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Lauren and Audrina fight to save their friendship, but it might be too late. Spencer's had enough of Heidi's sister Holly and takes matters into his own hands. And Brody and Doug get out of jail with a story to tell.

programme.title: The Hills S4 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Heidi's sister Holly reaches out to Lauren, forcing both Lauren and Heidi to reconsider what happened to their friendship. Audrina and Justin's relationship is tested as she works a huge event for Epic Records.

programme.title: The Hills S4 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Lauren leaves for family vacation, and things in Los Angeles go awry. Stephanie dates Doug behind Lauren's back, and Audrina gets friendly with Heidi.

programme.title: The Hills S4 Ep. 8
programme.desc: The truth finally comes out about Stephanie's relationship with Lauren's ex-boyfriend Doug. Heidi's mother makes a surprise visit to LA and has a confrontation with Spencer.

programme.title: The Hills S4 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Lauren gets a letter of apology from Heidi and realizes there's only one thing keeping them from being friends again. Audrina starts dating a new guy to make Justin jealous, but her plan backfires.

programme.title: The Hills S4 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Audrina reconnects with an old flame Cory and finds herself juggling two guys. Spencer forces Heidi to kick her sister Holly out of the apartment.

programme.title: The Hills S4 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Lauren and Audrina travel to Cabo for Brody's birthday, but the party turns into a fight. Spencer humiliates Stephanie after learning that her new boyfriend is friends with Brody.

programme.title: The Hills S4 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Lauren tries to make peace between Brody and Stephanie. Audrina wants to make things work with Corey but Justin won't give up on her. Stephanie has doubts about her new boyfriend after he fails to stand up to Brody.

programme.title: The Hills S4 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Audrina gets her own place, hoping Justin will move in with her but everyone fears she is moving for the wrong reason. Heidi invites Spencer to a work event and gets caught having a little too much fun.

programme.title: The Hills S4 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Whitney travels to New York expecting to reconnect with Alex, but a boy named Jay steals her away. Heidi is miserable after being fired, but when Spencer tries to get her old job back, he makes the situation much worse.

programme.title: The Hills S4 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Lauren lets Heidi's sister crash at her place. Justin asks Audrina to go away for a romantic weekend, and Heidi's frustration with Spencer grows after she has to beg for her job back.

programme.title: The Hills S4 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Audrina believes a rumor she hears: that Lauren hooked up with Justin. Meanwhile Holly tries to get Heidi away from Spencer.

programme.title: The Hills S4 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Audrina tries to save her friendship with Lauren after accusing her of hooking up with Justin. Spencer and Stephanie visit their grandmother who is fed up with their fighting.

programme.title: The Hills S4 Ep. 18
programme.desc: Whitney gets offered a chance at her dream job in her New York. Lauren grows nostalgic when she learns her parents are selling their house in Laguna Beach, and Stephanie turns to Spencer for help with Cameron.

programme.title: The Hills S4 Ep. 19
programme.desc: Spencer and Heidi ignore the concerns of their families and runaway to Mexico to elope. Whitney takes a chance at a dream job in New York City and says goodbye to Lauren and her life in Los Angeles.

programme.title: The Hills S4 Ep. 20
programme.desc: When Lauren and Heidi have a run-in, they put their feud aside and remember why they used to be friends. Spencer and Heidi deal with fallout of their elopment and Justin shocks Audrina when he whisks her away to Palm Springs.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Their senior year is winding down and the kids from Laguna Beach are just getting started for their summer of fun...and drama.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: The love triangle between Stephen, Kristin, and LC is becoming more obvious, and each of them is really starting to feel the pressure.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: When LC, Stephen and Trey check out a designer fashion show in LA, LC watches Stephen's attention turn from fashion to fashion models.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: When Morgan throws Christina an 18th-birthday bash, she cuts LC and Lo from the guest list, so bumping into them the next day at the nail salon was sweet irony. Christina and Morgan then head to NYC for their spring break trip.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: It's spring break in Cabo and anything can happen, especially since LC, Stephen and Kristin are staying in the same hotel. Kristin's wild partying at a club prompts a fight with Stephen, opening the door for him to hook back up with LC.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: After the craziness of Cabo, Kristin invites Stephen to a Blink 182 concert with the hopes of getting back together. LC, Lo, Trey and Dieter also hit the show and when an outsider insults LC and Lo's character, Trey steps up in their defense.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: It's prom time, and while everyone is caught up with who's going with whom, which pair of Charles David shoes look best with their dress, and how to fit everyone in the stretch Hummer-limo, Kristin's biggest concern is a drama-free night with Stephen.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: The seniors charter a yacht to Catalina, but Lo skips out, leaving LC without a buddy to survive camping, kayaking, and Stephen and Kristin's incessant cuddling.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Graduation day is here and the seniors spend time with their families getting ready for the big event. Through a Senior Video Project, the seniors reveal their personal thoughts on graduation, senior year, and life after Laguna.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S1 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Free from school, the gang lives up their last summer together, but when they gather for a final barbeque at Trey's house, the reality of leaving Laguna and each other starts to sink in.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S1 Ep. 11
programme.desc: In the final days before leaving Laguna, Stephen must tie up loose ends, first saying goodbye to Trey, then the surf shop, and finally Kristin. Luckily there's one person he won't have to part with.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: It's Christmas break in Laguna Beach. Kristin has ruled the school, LC is leaving San Francisco and the drama is all around.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Love and Laguna Beach mix like chocolate and onions. Things with Stephen and Kristin are dunzo, but what about him and LC? And rumors about Jason and Alex M abound.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: It's B-day time in LB for both Kristen and LC. Kristen and Talan flirt up a storm, while old feelings stir between Stephen and LC at her party south of the border.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Jason and Talan stir up all kinds of trouble when their eyes start to wander from their girlfriends Jessica and Taylor.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: It's time to suit up for the LB Winter Formal and nothing causes more drama than a girl asks boy dance. Drama is what Jason gets when he goes with Alex M not Jessica.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Valentine's Day brings nothing but trouble for Jessica who's still desperately hanging on to Jason (whose heart is clearly elsewhere).

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: The LB hotties head from the beach to the slopes to cheer up Jessica after Jason calls them dunzo.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: The Jessica, Jason and Alex M. love triangle continues to get complicated when Alex finds out that Jessica and Jason have been hooking up again behind her back.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: The gang heads south of the border to Cabo and things get super spicy when Alex confronts Jessica about hooking up with Jason and the two nearly come to blows.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Things get tricky when Talan professes his love to Kristen shortly before Stephen does the same.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Kristen hooks up with Jessica's new crush. Stephen and LC share a moment in San Fran.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 12
programme.desc: It's prom time again at LB and the usual hijinx are in full force. Kristin still has no date. Will Talan swoop in and take her, or is it stag city for the blonde bombshell?

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 13
programme.desc: LC decides it's time to do what she does best and throw a poolside BBQ. Kristin reluctantly shows up briefly, and Stephen idly watches as Jason steals LC's heart.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 14
programme.desc: The time has finally come for the gang to graduate high school and leave their LB bubble... mixed emotions run high and the tears start rolling.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Jason kisses Jessica and gets busted by LC. Look out!

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 16
programme.desc: LC throws another party and after his moronic actions at the benefit. Jason comes crawling back to apologize, but he can't even do that well.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 17
programme.desc: It's the end of the summer, and the time has come for everybody to leave beautiful Laguna Beach. The cast must come to terms with where their lives will go from here.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: It is a new year with a new cast and the drama starts right away in Laguna Beach. Tessa is invited to queen bee Kyndra's BBQ, but when Tessa brings her best friend Raquel, it's clear they are both unwanted guests.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S4 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Tony Wells, Chief Marketing and Customer Officer for The ADT Corporation, a leading provider of home security, struggles to sell their services to a recently robbed neighborhood bar.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S4 Ep. 14
programme.desc: When Eric Casaburi, the CEO of Retro Fitness, a full-service fitness center that is franchised, discovers an employee who hates customers and fails to follow directions leading to one of the biggest reveals ever on Undercover Boss.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S4 Ep. 15
programme.desc: John Wilson, President, and Chief Operating Officer of Rollins, Inc., the parent company for Orkin, North America's largest pest control provider, cleans up a major cockroach infestation and tackles swarming bees.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S4 Ep. 16
programme.desc: This special episode of Undercover Boss features updates on some of the most intriguing employees who have appeared on the show and how the experience impacted their life.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S4 Ep. 17
programme.desc: This special episode of Undercover Boss features updates on some of the most compelling bosses and how the undercover experience impacted them personally as well as the companies they lead.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S5 Ep. 1
programme.desc: The Boss of Twin Peaks goes undercover in his restaurant chain famous for scantily clad wait staff. An employee's crude language with customers throws the boss off guard. Former Hooters CEO Coby Brooks returns to the show with a darker side.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S5 Ep. 2
programme.desc: In a series first, an openly gay boss goes undercover! Can the boss measure up while manning the floor in the lingerie department? The Boss is hot under the collar when an employee continues to bad mouth his company.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S5 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Jane Grote Abell, Owner of Donato's Pizza, goes undercover to get an inside slice of the family business. The boss learns that the pizzas aren't the only things getting baked at one store. One store's archaic computer system leaves the boss in a bad mood.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S5 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Anthony Wedo, CEO of Buffets Inc., travels from his corner office to the back of the house. The boss breaks cover when flooded with a dishwasher's nasty attitude. The high-energy Boss meets his match when faced with an unruly cash register.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S5 Ep. 5
programme.desc: The CEO of Menchie's, Amit Kleinberger, tries to stay cool while working undercover in his dessert dynasty. The youngest Boss ever goes deeper in his undercover mission than he ever expected to go. Can the Boss go the "extra smile"?

programme.title: Undercover Boss S5 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Paul Quentel, CEO of Alfred Angelo, flexes his muscles for an undercover mission in his bridal shops. The Boss isn't afraid to walk the walk. In an Undercover Boss first, the Boss works with an employee who's hearing impaired.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S5 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Mike Bloom, President & COO of Family Dollar, pays an undercover visit to his 'cheap sheik' discount stores. One employee feels her store is lacking the 'family' in Family Dollar. Will the boss rise to the occasion when working with a forklift operator?

programme.title: Undercover Boss S5 Ep. 8
programme.desc: The President of Dutch Bros. Coffee, Travis Boersma, goes undercover to see what keeps his high-energy coffee chain brewing on all cylinders. The boss discovers he wants to go deeper undercover and embarks on a global journey to El Salvador.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S5 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Seven former bosses reflect on their memorable "busted" moments. The tables are turned when a former boss dons one last disguise.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S5 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Shane Evans, COO of Massage Heights, goes undercover to find the kinks in her company. One store's disregard for company policy rubs the Boss the wrong way. Can the boss of one of the largest massage chains in North America actually give a massage?

programme.title: Undercover Boss S5 Ep. 11
programme.desc: In the series first, a Native American Boss goes undercover. Bruce "Two Dogs" Bozsum, Chairman of Mohegan Sun Casino, goes all in while undercover inside his Indian gaming empire. Does the Boss have enough gas in the tank to work the valet line?

programme.title: Undercover Boss S5 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Joe Didomizio, CEO of Hudson Group, goes undercover to find out if his company is still the "traveler's best friend." What happens when this travel king discovers turmoil in the terminals? Will working as a barista prove too hot to handle for this boss?

programme.title: Undercover Boss S5 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Greg Miller, CEO of the NBA's Utah Jazz, suits up for an undercover mission. What will happen when the boss discovers not every bounce is going his way? This laid-back boss tries to find his "inner cheerleader" while working the stands as a Team Member.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S5 Ep. 14
programme.desc: In a series first, it's the employees going undercover, not the Boss. How will one undercover employee respond when faced with mission failure? How will the Boss react when he discovers his orders have been ignored?

programme.title: Undercover Boss S5 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Jeff Platt, the series' youngest CEO, goes undercover in his high-flying trampoline empire. How will the Boss react when one employee jumps to conclusions about his true identity? The Boss loses a spring in his step when tasked with building trampolines.

programme.title: Undercover Boss Canada S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: CEO John Tracogna goes undercover at Canada’s largest zoo to get up close and personal with endangered wildlife and the people that keep the organization running.

programme.title: Undercover Boss Canada S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Pizza Pizza CEO Paul Goddard goes undercover in the nation’s number one pizza mega brand, and learns that making dough and delivering pizza serves up some challenges he never imagined.

programme.title: Undercover Boss Canada S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Brian Scudamore, 1-800-GOT-JUNK? founder and CEO, goes undercover as a driver and junk collector, hauling loads of unwanted clutter in the world’s largest junk removal franchise, and comes out collecting something much more valuable.

programme.title: Undercover Boss Canada S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Toronto Transit Commission (TTC) City Councillor and TTC Chair Karen Stintz goes undercover inside the country's largest mass transit system to get her hands dirty with some of the toughest and grittiest jobs.

programme.title: Undercover Boss Canada S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: CEO Ellis Jacob goes undercover doling out snacks and tickets while assessing how to enhance the moviegoer experience within Canada’s largest motion picture exhibitor across the board.

programme.title: Undercover Boss Canada S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: CEO Ellis Jacob goes undercover doling out snacks and tickets while assessing how to enhance the moviegoer experience within Canada’s largest motion picture exhibitor across the board.

programme.title: The FBI Files S2 Ep. 19

programme.title: The FBI Files S5 Ep. 75

programme.title: The FBI Files S7 Ep. 118
programme.desc: In Boston, FBI agents and local police tracked a gang of robbers who specialized in armored car takedowns. Their MO was familiar. The gang used precise timing to steal millions in cash and burned their getaway cars to destroy evidence.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S4 Ep. 39

programme.desc: Anytime, anywhere, people disappear  kidnapped from their daily routines. Predators always leave clues behind, but chasing them takes time, hampering investigators' attempts to solve these fatal abductions.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S2 Ep. 8

programme.title: The FBI Files S7 Ep. 114

programme.title: The FBI Files S1 Ep. 3

programme.title: The FBI Files S6 Ep. 98
programme.desc: They were a gang of criminal masterminds. They carried automatic weapons and were not afraid to use them. With each and every new heist, they became bolder and more deadly, until the FBI stepped in, determined to end their violent rampage.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Tony will explore several regions of Colombia from the mountains down to the Caribbean coast to the coca leaf growing inlands formerly controlled by drug cartels.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 4
programme.desc: In this episode of Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown, Tony travels to Madagascar, a place that outsiders understand surprisingly little about.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 1
programme.desc: In this episode of Parts Unknown, Tony returns to one of his favourite places on Earth, Vietnam.He journeys to a city he has never been to, Hu?, The City of Ghosts.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Detroit holds a unique place in American history. Few cities have seen such a dramatic rise and fall from economic boom to disparity. Tony explores the past, present and future of the Motor City.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Tony explores the other Hawaii, the one that those eight million tourists don’t see when they come to the islands. He discovers the fabric of a true cultural mixing pot.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Sicily isn’t about fast food or the fast life. It’s about savoring family, life, food and making the most of what you have. Tony will go in search of those foods and their producers and eat his way around the island.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Tony explores what Burroughs called "Interzone," where artists sought escape from Western moral prohibitions and the possibilities of great empty spaces. But what is it like now?

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 3
programme.desc: A country of only six million people where a vast percentage of the land is steaming hot jungle or a huge scrub desert known simply as The Chaco. This is one of the least known nations in the world.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Tony dives into the ever-changing state of Punjab, India. Starting off his journey in Amritsar, Tony is immediately struck by the chaos around him.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 6
programme.desc: In this episode of Parts Unknown Tony travels back to his homeland, his roots, his favorite state in the union: New Jersey. Part nostalgia, part cautionary tale. Tony makes sure to hit up some NJ classics.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Tony visits Andalucia during Semana Santa – Holy Week – a time filled with great pageantry and excitement. Tony’s longtime DP, Zach Zamboni, currently lives in Granada with his fiancée, Fuen Sanchez.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Tony seeks to challenge his notions of Mississippi by taking a road trip to meet a cast of Mississippians enjoying the diverse foodways and embracing the traditional and contemporary music worlds.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Tony and his friend, world-renowned chef Eric Ripert, explore the far reaches of indigenous Andes in search of a rare variety of wild cocoa that is said to be the "best" in the world.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: In this episode, we leave behind Africa we’ve come to know in the news. Instead, we embrace the wild, untamed land of mystery, adventure, and exoticism; Zanzibar.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Roy Choi’s food reflects a new American idea of "natural" fusion. Bourdain examines the meeting point of Asian, Mexican, Latino culture in modern LA.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 1
programme.desc: In this episode of Parts Unknown, we first visit the city of Glasgow, then we head north into the Scottish Highlands.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Tony travels to Shanghai. Forget the antiquated views you might hold about a communist-run, creativity-devoid State of androids. The modern China is a vibrant, dynamic monument to capitalism.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Tony accompanies world-renowned chef and restaurateur Daniel Boulud as they travel back to Daniel’s hometown of Lyon, France for a pilgrimage of the city’s rich food culture and its legendary chefs.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Tony travels to Mexico City and Oaxaca to meet who fight for the food, the art, and the lives they believe in. In the Santa Anita neighbourhood of Mexico City, Tony meets boxer Jorge Lacierva.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 4
programme.desc: This unique episode looks closely at the “other” Massachusetts far away from the blue blood getaways of Nantucket or the urban sprawl of Boston that most people know so little about.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 6
programme.desc: The Bronx is burning, became the defining image of New York City in the 70s. Politicians used it as a backdrop illustrate the dire situation in America’s cities while local officials let it burn

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Bourdain looks at the Congo as one of the more industrialized powers in Africa now largely crumbled to nothingness and chaos with Tim Butcher author of Blood River.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: The two funniest and most brilliant chef/restaurateurs in Canada, Joe Beef's Dave McMillan and Fred Morin, take Tony across Canada by rail.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Tony teams up with Chef and Author Andy Ricker of Pok Pok Restaurant fame. He's made a name for himself faithfully reproducing the cuisine of Northern Thailand at his restaurants in Portland and NYC.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Few countries have a more contentious relationship with the United States than Iran. In this episode we heads to this Shia Muslim nation to explore a country few Americans have visited since the 80s.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Tony travels to Las Vegas Nevada with his food author friend Michael Ruhlman. Whatever your need, whatever bad behaviour you’d like to display Las Vegas is the place that will allow it... for a price.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 2
programme.desc: After eight years, Tony returns to South Korea. And this time, he’s no stranger to kimchi. But just as Tony has changed, so has Korea.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Tony heads back to his much-beloved Salvador, Brazil. The ever-present street festivals and the famous Carnival parade begin with sitting down with a local artist in the streets of the historic Pelo.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 8
programme.desc: In this episode Tony travels to the lesser-known, North Eastern Coast of Jamaica. White sandy beaches and a cool breeze with a tropical umbrella drink in hand is usually the perception of island life.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 5
programme.desc: For the first time, Tony visits Budapest, 25 years after democracy planted its flag –alongside the Oscar-winning master of light, cinematographer Vilmos Zsigmond, as one of his key guides.

programme.title: Shark Gordon S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Ian Gordon has been called upon to handle the delicate matter of moving an adult ragged tooth shark from one aquarium to another.

programme.title: Shark Man with Riley Elliott S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Right at the southern end of New Zealand we find Stewart Island, home to the Great White Shark. Locals are convinced that the shark cage operators are attracting the sharks in, putting them at risk when fishing and diving.

programme.title: Shark Gordon S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: People are jumping into cages and getting up close to big, hungry sharks. But what happens when you purposely attract these animals?

programme.title: Snake Boss S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Julia is put to the test trying to catch on of Australia's fastest snakes. Barry gives Julia a tough decision to make. A keelback is on the loose. Finally, Johnny and Julia are faced with a grim situation.

programme.title: Snake Boss S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Julia rescues a policeman from an unwelcome intruder. Johnny gets to go up against a venomous snake all on his own. And Julia gets to go explore at night in a leech infested forest.

programme.title: Snake Boss S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: It's touch and go for a python that has been attacked by two dogs; Johnny's artistic side is ignited, and Julia tries to control some misbehaving kids.

programme.title: Shark Man with Riley Elliott S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Riley has a fear of stingrays. Like many people the death of Croc Hunter Steve Irwin led him to believe that stingrays are dangerous animals. But are they? To find out and to challenge his fear, Riley heads out to meet a bunch of stingrays.

programme.title: Snake Boss S1 Ep. 11
programme.desc: It's all about the fear factor this time, as Julia deals with a potted threat first, before catching a tiny house dweller, and scaling a rooftop to rescue a big snake.

programme.title: Snake Boss S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Julia will get a love-bite from her favorite snake, Bonny the dog continues her snake detection training, and then there's a deadly wrangle with a juvenile eastern brown.

programme.title: Snake Boss S1 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Training is in full flow for Bonny the dog on her quest to sniff out snakes, but Julia is called poolside to fish out one cool snake, before facing an extremely close call.

programme.title: Snake Boss S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Julia rescues a terrified Russian rapper from a neighborhood "gangster", Johnny finds himself in a tug of war with a python and bonny gets her first shot looking for snakes in the field.

programme.desc: Julia faces off against an unwelcome house guest in the form of an inquisitive serpent. Meanwhile, the new member of the team, Bonny, goes to doggy boot camp.

programme.title: Shark Man with Riley Elliott S1 Ep. 3
