programme.desc: Julia grapples with a massive python, before encountering a lightning fast whip snake and visiting a hospital to talk snake bites.

programme.title: Human Prey S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: While diving for shellfish off Cape Howe, an Australian man ends up inside the jaws of a Great White shark. Determined to maintain his championship spear fishing title, an Australian man inadvertently becomes bait for a 15-foot-long Great White shark.

programme.title: Ocean Predators S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: On their own in the Pacific Ocean are the Chatham Islands: wild, remote, and circled by a population of great white sharks.

programme.title: Ocean Predators S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: In pristine waters, in one of the most remote locations on earth, lives a mysterious species of shark.

programme.title: Snake Boss S1 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Julia confronts her fear on heights while trying to wrangle a massive carpet python. Meanwhile, Johnny Must try to catch two of them. Later Julia has a close call with the worlds second deadliest snake.

programme.title: Shark Gordon S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Ian Gordon has been recruited to help with a research project in Australia. He has the hard part of the project, lassoing reef sharks by the tail.

programme.title: Human Prey S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: While on the job at an Florida golf club, an experienced golf ball diver is attacked by a territorial, 400-pound alligator. Jeff Tanswell's snorkeling trip turns into a bloody battle for his life when he is dragged under by an 12-foot saltwater crocodile.

programme.title: Snake Boss S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Julia teams up with a terrier to track down a suspected deadly intruder. Meanwhile, she rescues Bob from a tetchy python, and comes up with a great marketing idea.

programme.title: Shark Gordon S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Meet Ian Gordon, one of the world’s leading shark specialists, and encounter nature's most notorious shark, the ultimate predator: the Great White.

programme.title: Snake Boss S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Johnny Gets trapped in a tight spot with an unhappy snake. Julia finds herself in a very precarious battle with a python. And finally a bitter sweet visit to the RSPCA.

programme.title: Snake Boss S1 Ep. 12
programme.desc: It is a snake snack-o-rama. Johnny and Julia rescue a pet budgie before its too late. Johnny wrangles another python. And the both of them welcome a new member to the snake catching team.

programme.title: Shark Man with Riley Elliott S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Pauanui Beach has been closed due to sharks. What type of shark are they and what are they doing here? Riley is on a mission to find out. Once the species has been identified Riley sets about catching and tagging them.

programme.title: Snake Boss S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Johnny has one stinker of a day and Julia teaches us a few things about owning and caring for a lizard before dealing with a deadly trespasser.

programme.title: Shark Man with Riley Elliott S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Riley Elliott is off to the Bay of Islands to attach the first of his high tech satellite transmitters for the season. He won't just be on the boat however, he plans to get into the water and hand feed the Blues.

programme.title: Shark Gordon S1 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Ian finds a population of Pelagic Threshers performing strange behaviors. He'll dive with one of the world’s rarest sharks to get to the bottom of it.

programme.title: Ocean Predators S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: In the waters off New Zealand, host Kina Scollay leaps into the water with a pod of orca. Watching his back is Ingrid Visser, world renowned orca expert.

programme.title: Shark Gordon S1 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Until remote cameras were invented, no one had ever seen the prickly shark. Shark Gordon is hot on the scene to check out these mysterious sharks.

programme.title: Shark Gordon S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: The Oceanic White Tip is one of the only sharks that makes Ian Gordon nervous. They prey on whatever they can find, including shipwrecked humans.

programme.title: Cooking with Love
programme.desc: Hardworking and optimistic television producer, Kelly, doesn't have time for love. Along with her mentor Amanda, Kelly dives into another season of the Little Gourmet, a kids cooking show.

programme.title: A Match in Manhattan
programme.desc: When Celeste loses her job as a teacher, her boss puts her forward for an au pair job with a NY Property Tycoon. As she struggles with the children, can Celeste win over Richard and his children so she can keep her job, or maybe love has other plans...

programme.title: Calling for Love
programme.desc: Podcast host Samantha has an aversion to romance but is assigned to host a show that reunites lost loves. She then falls for charming Jake, who calls in with a problem she is determined to solve.

programme.title: For the Love of Lily
programme.desc: A career-minded city girl must build a rooftop garden with an old-school country boy to appease her boss's new passion for 'green' living and secure her promotion. But love may be in bloom.

programme.title: From Italy with Amore
programme.desc: When Ariel sees her dream man, she will stop at nothing to get to know him better. In her quest to see him again, she meets restaurateur Daniel, who shows her that food is the way to her heart.

programme.title: Love at the Bootcamp
programme.desc: When a scattered marketing exec is tasked with helping an unpopular small-town bootcamp turn its image around, she finds that the strict, regimented ways of its owner might just be the perfect 'fit' for love.

programme.title: The Boxer and the Butterfly
programme.desc: When an aspiring dancer is dropped by her partner days before her big performance, she'll need to teach a down-and-out boxer some moves to win the prize money and open her dream dance studio.

programme.title: The Royal Bake Off
programme.desc: Allie and Marily are rivals in the small town of Meadow Ridge, their bakeries across the street from each other. Their rivalry intensifies when the Royal Prince of Samavia rolls into town looking for a royal baker for his brother’s coronation. When Allie and the Royal Prince hit it off, it seems he might be in the market for more than just a terrific cake. But will the sneaky Marilyn let Allie get it all: the gig and the prince? Of course not.

programme.title: Love Is A Piece Of Cake
programme.desc: Jessie's a third generation baker who loves her cake shop more than anything in the world. When developers threaten to buy her building and force her out, she must do all she can to save her bakery.

programme.title: Love on Harbor Island
programme.desc: Interior designer Lily returns home to help her Aunt Maggie run her marina-side bed and breakfast when she meets Marcus, a handsome seaplane pilot.

programme.title: Love's Second Chance
programme.desc: When Rose returns home to inherit her grandmother’s dress shop, she runs into her high school crush, Cole. They soon realize that just like the shop, their love deserves a second chance as well.

programme.title: Starting Up Love
programme.desc: Jillian inherits a beautiful mountainside cabin after her long-lost, wealthy uncle dies. She plans to sell it, but handsome caretaker Liam makes her an offer she can’t refuse, and sparks fly as they work to transform the cabin into a holiday resort.

programme.title: The Baby Proposal
programme.desc: Layla has it all figured out, a thriving career and a loving fiance. She co-hosts Wake Up Chicago with Derek. Sparks begin to fly between them when they become the unexpected guardians of a baby.

programme.title: 10 Truths About Love
programme.desc: Hannah, a romance columnist, thinks she's got life and love figured out until her boyfriend unexpectedly breaks up with her. Her editor hires a new writer to collaborate on her column and sparks fly.

programme.title: Suite Francaise
programme.desc: In the early years of the Nazi occupation of France, romance blooms between a villager and a German soldier.

programme.title: Beyond the Stars
programme.desc: When Eric meets his hero, astronaut Paul Andrews, he is disappointed by how far he has fallen.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Daddy's Little Girls
programme.desc: A mechanic enlists the help of an attorney while trying to wrest custody of his daughters from his ex-wife.

programme.title: W.
programme.desc: A chronicle of the life and Presidency of George W. Bush.

programme.title: Shattered Glass
programme.desc: The story of a journalist who fell from grace when it was discovered he fabricated over half of his articles.

programme.title: The Honor List
programme.desc: Three former best friends reunite when the fourth member of their group suddenly passes away.

programme.title: The Great Debaters
programme.desc: In 1935, students at historically black Wiley College form a debate team, and go on to defeat Harvard.

programme.title: Hampstead
programme.desc: An widow and a man living wild on Hampstead Heath take on the developers who want to destroy his home.

programme.title: Trumbo
programme.desc: Trumbo was Hollywood's top screenwriter until he was jailed and blacklisted for his political beliefs.

programme.title: This Must Be the Place
programme.desc: A retired rock star returns to NYC to find the Nazi responsible for humiliating his recently deceased father.

programme.title: The Last Face
programme.desc: International aid workers in Africa fight for humanity during civil unrest.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S2 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Gabby has the perfect tool to get Blaze ready to race: a special remote that can control any machine. But when Crusher takes her remote, he activates machines all over town to slow Blaze down.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S3 Ep. 13
programme.desc: The girls visit the Glitter Genie to learn glitter magic, but something is causing Shimmer to keep messing up. / The girls visit the Gem Princess, who takes them underwater to help gather crystals in the beautiful coral reef.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S1 Ep. 19
programme.desc: When Leah accidentally lets a goat out of its pen at the petting zoo, she calls on Shimmer and Shine to help get him back. The girls and pets are led on a farmland adventure in pursuit of the escaped goat.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S4 Ep. 26
programme.desc: When Zeta and Nazboo get zkunked by a smelly Zahramay zkunk, Shimmer, Shine and Leah try to help them get un-stinky. Zeta teams up with Shimmer, Shine, Leah and Princess Samira to stop Uzma from taking all the magic from Zahramay Falls.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S4 Ep. 7
programme.desc: When Zeta gets hold of a magical painting gem, she creates lots of troublesome art that the girls must get under control. When Leah accidentally wishes for the day to last forever, the kids must find a way to make the moon come up to end the day.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S8 Ep. 20
programme.desc: Dora and Boots try to keep a very sleepy Baby Bear awake long enough to get her home for her winter nap.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S4 Ep. 23
programme.desc: Zeta wreaks havoc when she enchants her sister's new zadazzling wand in an attempt to take over Zahramay Falls. When Zac opens a hotdog stand in Zahramay Falls, Zeta tries using the hotdogs to make her most powerful potion yet.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S1 Ep. 990
programme.desc: Dora's Enchanted Forest Adventures Part III: Dora Saves King Unicornio: Dora and Boots return to the Enchanted Forest to save it from Owl, who has taken over as king and set up new rules banning scarecrows, elves and fairies from the forest!

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S8 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Dora's Ice Skating Adventure: Dora and Boots return to the Snowy Forest to help the Snow Princess defeat the Ice Witch in a skating contest and win back everyone's ice skates.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S2 Ep. 11
programme.desc: When Zeta and Nazboo suck all the glitter out of a volcano, the girls must travel into the volcano to stop them. Zeta steals Leah, Shimmer, and Shine's magical gem, enchanting cleaning supplies that cause lots of trouble.

programme.title: Team Umizoomi S2 Ep. 216
programme.desc: Sticky Bear: Silly Bear is in trouble! He accidentally spilled sticky glue everywhere, and now he sticks to everything he touches. Luckily, Team Umizoomi has just what he needs - a bar of super soap!

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S4 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Shimmer, Shine and Leah explore the Dragon Forest and meet Farnaz, a Dragon Rider who teaches them to ride dragons! But when Zeta takes a flock of dragons, including Farnaz's, the girls and Farnaz must work together to stop her before it's too late.

programme.title: Team Umizoomi S2 Ep. 209
programme.desc: Umi City Egg Hunt: Milli, Geo and Bot are determined to help their friend April find The Rainbow Egg! But when the egg takes a tumble down a rabbit hole, it's up to the tiny Team to jump in after it.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S2 Ep. 19
programme.desc: Swoops the helicopter loses his rotor, and without it he can’t fly! It’s time for Blaze and AJ to retrieve the runaway rotor, adventuring up onto The Sky Track, an amazing course that weaves through the clouds.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S1 Ep. 11
programme.desc: It's Christmas Eve, and Leah is transported to the North Pole! After Leah accidentally wishes Santa to a tropical island and the elves asleep, it's up to the girls to deliver the presents and save Christmas... genie-style!

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S8 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Catch that Shape Train: Dora and Boots are making a Shape Train in his Boots' sticker book, but when the train goes rolling down the track without Círculo the steering wheel, they need your help to catch it before it gets to Big Turn!

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: The evil Sorceress Zeta steals Shimmer and Shine's new gem, transporting Leah and Zac into Zahramay Falls with it!

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: When Leah's bucket full of beach treasures floats into the vast ocean, Leah summons Shimmer and Shine to help her retrieve the loot.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S3 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Gasquatch is back! He’s been saving up his money to buy the ultimate toy… a Mega Mud Robot. But when his coins go missing, it’s up to Blaze to help his mud-loving friend recover them before the toy store closes.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S3 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Zeta steals the amazing Glitter Genie's staff. If the girls don't get it back in time, the Glitter Genie's palace will disappear! / When the girls discover a blank gem, they take it to meet the Gem Princess who gives each gem its power.

programme.title: Team Umizoomi S2 Ep. 208
programme.desc: Bot's Crazy Skates: Geo is teaching Milli some skate moves at the skate park today! Bot wants to join in, but accidentally puts on a pair of crazy skates. Once he starts rolling, he can't stop!

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S3 Ep. 13
programme.desc: In the sky above Animal Island, a remarkable race is about to begin. But before Blaze can join, he must spread his wings!

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S1 Ep. 121
programme.desc: El Coqui: In this version of the famous Puerto Rican legend, Dora and Boots find a sad, homesick little coqui who's lost his voice. Dora and Boots offer to take the frog home to his island.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: When Starla, the friendly cowgirl truck, loses one of her pistons Blaze and AJ set out to get it back. But they’ll have to hurry before Crusher gets his greedy tires on it!

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S8 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Riding the Roller Coaster Rocks: Dora, Boots, and Abuela are exploring the rainforest looking for the secret door to Adventure Forest! It's a magical forest amusement park that Abuela used to go to when she was a little girl!

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Today Darington will attempt his biggest stunt yet: rocketing to the moon! But there's just one problem. His battery-powered rocket is out of energy. To get to the moon Blaze must help Darington recharge his battery.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S1 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Blaze and his friends have joined the Truck Rangers, a scouting club where trucks earn badges for their accomplishments. But when Crusher's selfish scouting lands everyone in a heap of trouble, Blaze must race to the rescue!

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S8 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Puppies Galore: Dora, Boots, Benny, and a stroller full of rambunctious puppies rush to save their puppy friend, Little Boots, before he wakes up a bear.

programme.title: Team Umizoomi S1 Ep. 107
programme.desc: Today is Daniel's birthday, but there's a problem - the party is about to start, but his Dad is stuck on a broken train with the birthday cake! Daniel calls Team Umizoomi for help.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Leah and Zac try building a treehouse but find themselves in over their heads. Leah asks her genies for a treehouse and is thrown for a loop when Shimmer and Shine turn her house into a house of trees!

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: It’s Halloween in Axle City, and Blaze, AJ, and all of their friends are excited to “Truck or Treat.” But when Crusher tries to steal all of their candy, his plan goes awry, and he sends their treats far, far away from Axle City.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: When Leah and her genies are trapped in a cave, it's up to their friends Zac and Kaz to save the day. When the girls bake magical flying cookies, Zeta and Nazboo sneak into their palace to steal the flying flour.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S1 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Leah notices Zac the Magician's magic tricks aren't going well, so she calls on her genies for some real magic assistance. But Shimmer and Shine aren't getting the tricks right either, and the girls have a magical mess to fix!

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S3 Ep. 15
programme.desc: When the Great Animal Crown is lost at the bottom of the ocean, Blaze transforms into a super-fast shark to retrieve it for his Animal Island friends. But he’ll have to swim fast – or Crusher may get to the crown first.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S7 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Dora and Boots are at the beach when they find a little lost mermaid who needs to get back to her mommy at Mermaid Cove. Together the 3 set off on an underwater adventure!

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S6 Ep. 611
programme.desc: Dora and Boots are heading to the Bike Shop to pick up Boots' very first bike today.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S3 Ep. 6
programme.desc: A light thief (Melissa Rauch) is on the loose, leaving all of Axle City in the dark! Gabby outfits Blaze with special lights to help him track down the light thief and restore the missing lights.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Leah and Zac are excited to watch their favorite movie, but Leah's popcorn burns and the movie won't play. Leah asks Shimmer and Shine for some movie magic help, but they accidentally wish the movie to life!

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S3 Ep. 20
programme.desc: It’s race day, and Crusher is cheating twice as hard to beat Blaze and Watts - sending both drivers far, far away! But Blaze and Watts are determined to save AJ and Gabby and get back to the race in time to win!

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S4 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Shimmer and Zahrora accidentally cause some trouble when they visit a new part of Zahramay Skies called Zahraconia. The girls meet Shaya's twin brother Shaun and help them when their magic combines to form a powerful Lightning Burst Cloud.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S4 Ep. 3
programme.desc: When Zeta traps the girls in a magic bubble, Tala, Nahal and Parisa team up with the girls' Zahracorns to free them. Shimmer, Shine and Leah meet Rubi, a Rainbow Genie-In-Training, whose rainbows quickly get out of control.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S7 Ep. 18
programme.desc: Dora and Boots take a rainbow butterfly, Mariposa, to the Butterfly Ball where everybody gets to have wings.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: When Zeta accidentally transports Tala the monkey to her lair, the girls set out to rescue her. The girls meet a real life ice genie! But when Zeta steals her ice gem necklace, it's up to the girls to stop her.

programme.title: Team Umizoomi S1 Ep. 113
programme.desc: Andy at the Umi City Airport is on the plane with his family and can't wait to go on his first trip to the beach. But the plane can't take off, and everything is going wrong!

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S7 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Join Dora for a Father's Day adventure! When the Little Kite she makes for Papi gets blown away in the wind, she'll need your help before she goes out over the ocean!

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S2 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Crusher’s Grammy is in town to watch Crusher and Blaze race at the Monster Dome. But when Crusher tries to cheat using rocket skis, his plan backfires, blasting him off the racetrack and across Axle City! Part 1

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S1 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Blaze discovers an exciting new sport called Truckball. But when Crusher and his team of cronies challenge him, Blaze must scour all of Axle City to put together a Truckball team before the big game.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S1 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Leah has invited Shimmer and Shine over for a sleepover party, where they'll eat pizza, dance all night, and sleep in a pillow fort! But when all the party plans go awry, the genies help Leah out with some wish granting.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S4 Ep. 16
programme.desc: An enchanted treasure map leads Shimmer, Shine, Leah, and their Dragon Rider friend Farnaz to the powerful Dragon Gem. But when Zeta gets ahold of the gem, it's up to Farnaz and the girls to get it back before Zeta becomes too powerful to stop.

programme.title: Team Umizoomi S2 Ep. 217
programme.desc: The Great UmiCar Rescue: UmiCar is more than just a car; he's a hero and an important member of Team Umizoomi. So when UmiCar gets stranded on an iceberg, the team act fast to save their friend!

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S6 Ep. 603
programme.desc: Boots really wants to give his mommy a picture of himself for her birthday, but he's having a really bad hair day! Dora and Boots set out on a Hairy Quest: Boots is ready for his close-up!

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S3 Ep. 5
programme.desc: When Nazboo's siblings come to visit, Zeta recruits them to help take the girls' gems when they're not home. / When Zac wishes himself into the forest to find a mythical creature, Kaz and the girls adventure to find him.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S4 Ep. 6
programme.desc: When flight magic disappears from Zahramay Skies, Rubi and the girls try to set things right, using rainbows to get around. When Zeta combines Daydream Dust with Dream Come True Dust, genies' daydreams start coming true and wreaking havoc.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Zeta uses a magical gem to shrink everything in Zahramay Falls, including Leah, Shimmer, and Shine! Leah, Zac, Zeta, and the genies compete in the most fun sport in Zahramay Falls: Zoomicorn Toss.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 81
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs and Plankton have been business rivals and bitter enemies for longer than anyone can remember. But one day, Mr. Krabs reveals that they were not always this way. There was a time when the two rivals were best friends.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 82
programme.desc: Mr. Krab's old fry cook pays a special visit to the Krusty Krab. SpongeBob is in awe of his predecessor, who has since become a world-renowned chef./Tales of the boogeyman send SpongeBob into a panic.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 83
programme.desc: We check on Patrick's morning routine in 'Rise and Shine', SpongeBob must be patient for his cereal-based entertainment in 'Waiting', and then in 'Fungus Among Us', SpongeBob develops a case of Ick!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 84
programme.desc: Mr Krabs is determined to uncover Plankton's next devious plot in 'Spy Buddies', we learn advanced boating techniques in 'Boat Smarts', and Mr Krabs holds a competition in 'Good Old Whatshisname'.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 85
programme.desc: SpongeBob moves into the Krusty Krab (so that he'll never be late again) in 'New Digs', and then in 'Krabs A La Mode', Plankton has an idea to cause some chilly trouble for Mr Krabs.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 86
programme.desc: A scary roller coaster opens at Bikini Bottom's amusement park in 'Roller Cowards', then in 'Bucket Sweet Bucket', Plankton tricks SpongeBob, Patrick and Squidward into fixing up the Chum Bucket.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 87
programme.desc: SpongeBob has trouble saying goodbye to the most perfect Krabby Patty he has ever cooked up in 'To Love A Patty', and then in 'Breath of Fresh Squidward', Squidward becomes the most jovial Squid ever!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 88
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs wishes he could talk to money in 'Money Talks', and then in 'SpongeBob vs the Patty Gadget', SpongeBob battles a patty-making machine. Plus there's a dance contest in 'Slimy Dancing'.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 89
programme.desc: A food critic gives SpongeBob high praise, and Mr Krabs takes advantage in 'The Krusty Sponge'. Then in 'Sing A Song Of Patrick', SpongeBob helps Patrick get his song some airplay on the radio.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 90
programme.desc: Sandy's Tree Dome has a flea problem in 'A Flea In Her Dome'. Patrick accidentally takes SpongeBob's donut and feels guilty in 'Donut of Shame', and SpongeBob is washing dishes in 'The Krusty Plate'.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 91
programme.desc: Plankton turns everyone into babies in 'Goo Goo Gas', and then in 'Le Big Switch', SpongeBob switches places with a snooty French chef at a high-end restaurant.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 93
programme.desc: SpongeBob must stay clean for 'Picture Day' in boating school, Patrick eats for free in 'Pat No Pay', and then in 'Blackjack', SpongeBob must stand up to his nefarious cousin Blackjack.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 94
programme.desc: SpongeBob accidentally punches himself and gets a black eye in 'Blackened Sponge', while in 'Mermaid Man vs. SpongeBob', Mermaid Man and Barnacle Boy are brainwashed by Plankton!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 95
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick board a ship of prisoners going to jail in 'The Inmates Of Summer', and then in 'To Save A Squirrel', SpongeBob and Patrick stow away on one of Sandy's wilderness expeditions.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 96
programme.desc: Pest Of The West: SpongeBob discovers that he was related to the great Western hero, SpongeBuck. Hired as the sheriff of Dead Eye Gulch, he must reclaim the town from no-good Dead Eye Plankton.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 97
programme.desc: It's a battle of the restaurants in '20,000 Patties Under The Sea', and then in 'The Battle Of Bikini Bottom', Patrick and SpongeBob discover that they have very different views about cleanliness.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 98
programme.desc: WhoBob WhatPants?: SpongeBob gets a bump on the bonce and can't remember who he is. His friends back in Bikini Bottom, who once told him to get lost, soon find they're missing him.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 99
programme.desc: SpongeBob accidentally messes up Squidward's face in 'The Two Faces Of Squidward', and then in 'Spongehenge', SpongeBob's sponge brings all the jellyfish to the city.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 100
programme.desc: SpongeBob's singing means no more Krabby Patties in 'Banned In Bikini Bottom'. Then in 'Stanley S. SquarePants', SpongeBob's cousin comes to visit, and quickly turns his life upside down.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 101
programme.desc: Squidward invites a TV show to visit his not exactly camera-ready home in 'House Fancy', then in 'Krabby Road', SpongeBob thinks that Plankton is trying to start a band. Which gives Plankton an idea.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 102
programme.desc: Mr Krabs can't believe that SpongeBob found a penny in 'Penny Foolish', and then in 'Nautical Novice', SpongeBob thinks of a new way to get his boating licence from Mrs. Puff.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 103
programme.desc: Plankton replaces the Chum Bucket with a Roman coliseum (and togas!) in 'Spongicus', and then in 'Suctioncup Symphony', Squidward is sure to win a music contest - if SpongeBob and Patrick stay quiet!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 104
programme.desc: When Squidward points out that SpongeBob is 'Not Normal', he resolves to change his ways. And then in 'Gone', SpongeBob wakes up to discover that everyone in Bikini Bottom is... gone!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 105
programme.desc: SpongeBob is injured at work in 'The Splinter', while in 'Slide Whistle Stooges', SpongeBob and Patrick are driving Squidward crazy with their new slide whistles.

programme.desc: When Norb gets a train set for Arbor Day and Dag only gets an air freshener, Dag's jealousy gets the better of him.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S4 Ep. 74
programme.desc: After eating pork rinds, Helga begins to sleepwalk and ends up walking to Arnold's house. The Fighting Families Contest has come to town and has selected two families.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S1 Ep. 12
programme.desc: When a movie lets out later than expected, Arnold and the gang have no choice but to take the subway home./Arnold and the gang set out on a quest to find the hidden treasure of the mysterious "Wheezin' Ed" on Elk Island.

programme.title: Rocket Power S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: The Shore Shack earns the gang enough in tips to finance their entry in the New Zealand Junior Waikikamukau Games. The games feature four extreme competitions for teams.

programme.title: The Angry Beavers S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Norb secretly props up Dag's secret super hero identity until he gets in a tight jam and then it's Muscular Beavers To The Rescue!'.'

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S3 Ep. 57
programme.desc: Girl Trouble/School Dance: Arnold tells Grandpa he''s tired of dealing with Helga''s nonsense. Grandpa tells Arnold a story about a girl he had to deal with when he was a kid who treated him the same way. She turns out to be Grandma.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S1 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Helga's older sister, Olga, comes home from college -- much to Helga's displeasure -- and quickly garners all of her parents' attention. /Arnold and Gerald have been saving up cereal box tops to get a telescope before the arrival of Salley's Comet.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S4 Ep. 79
programme.desc: Washed up balladeer Dino Spumoni fakes his own death in order to increase his record sales. Everyone believes he's dead and at the funeral, Grandpa and Arnold find out that Dino has left Arnold all his future record sales.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S5 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Tired of being told what to do by his parents, Timmy wishes that he would have to do the opposite of whatever his parents told him. Timmy wishes he was a teenager to ride the cool new ride at the amusement park.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S10 Ep. 1
programme.desc: The Big Fairy Share Scare: Timmy finds out that he has to share his fairies with the new girl in school, Chloe Carmichael. But when Chloe realizes she can use her magic for good, she wishes everyone in Dimmsdale would share everything, and chaos ensues.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S2 Ep. 34
programme.desc: Freeze Frame/Phoebe Cheats: Arnold and Gerald catch a suspicious man on film and they follow him clue-to-clue.In an effort to win a class poetry contest, Phoebe copies a poem from a book.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S3 Ep. 46
programme.desc: Arnold accidentally breaks a promise he made to Iggy and must deal with the consequences. / Big Bob hires a nanny for Helga. Helga fights the nanny at her own game and forces her to leave.

programme.title: Rocket Power S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: When the news comes to Madtown to show the new Blader Bowl Otto decides it's his chance to make it to the big time.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S7 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Chicken Poofs/Stupid Cupid: Poof gets the "Chicken Poofs" and turns everyone into actual chickens! Timmy steals Cupid's arrows in an attempt to make Trixie fall in love with him and go to the school "Romance Dance."

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S7 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Play Date... of Doom/Teacher's Pet: Foop is back! He’s escaped from prison and convinced Cosmo and Wanda he’s ready for a playdate with Poof. But he’s really there to try and destroy his arch enemy again, and it’s up to Timmy and Poof to thwart his plan.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S3 Ep. 51
programme.desc: Phoebe Takes the Fall/The Pig War: Phoebe agrees to take a dive so that Helga can win a competition./The boys engage in a recreation of a historical battle, only this time their prized pig is in danger of losing his life.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S4 Ep. 75
programme.desc: After being saved from thugs by a mysterious, caped character named Monkeyman, Arnold tells the gang about it. Out on a field trip, Harold and Helga miss the bus and get separated from the rest of the class.
